Private Sub SetDataBinding()

    End If

Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frm_Main

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화    
    '******************************************************************************
    Public Sub New()

        InitializeComponent()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        ComboBox1.Items.Add("LH")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("RH")

        ComboBox1.Text = "LH"

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        If ComboBox1.Text = "LH" Then
            GetDataSetLH()
        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "RH" Then
            GetDataSetRH()
        End If


        'grid3.NullText = ""
        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        'grid3.ExtendLastCol = True
        If ComboBox1.Text = "LH" Then
            Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main_LH")
        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "RH" Then
            Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main_RH")
        End If


        'grid3.Row(0).Height = 0
        'grid3.Column(1).Locked = True
        'grid3.Column(2).Locked = True

        For i As Integer = 1 To 17
            Grid1.Column(i).Locked = True
            Grid1.Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.LeftCenter
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSetLH()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.100;Initial Catalog=NX4_RR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main_LH")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub
    Private Sub GetDataSetRH()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.100;Initial Catalog=NX4_RR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main_RH")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")

        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

        End If

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

content.thinking:
Now I have all the files. Let me plan the changes:

1. **FrmMain.Designer.vb** - Replace `FlexCell.Grid` with `DataGridView`
2. **FrmMain.vb** - Replace FlexCell API calls with DataGridView equivalents
3. **SERVEr Search.vbproj** - Remove FlexCell DLL reference

The changes needed:

### Designer:
- `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()` → `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`
- Remove: CheckedImage, UncheckedImage, DefaultFont, DefaultRowHeight properties


- Keep: Location, Size, Name, TabIndex, Margin, Font
- Add DataGridView-specific properties: ReadOnly, AllowUserToAddRows, etc.
- `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid` → `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`

### FrmMain.vb:
Now I need to remove all the FlexCell-specific property assignments like BoldFixedCell, DisplayFocusRect, DisplayRowArrow, and replace the SetDataBinding call with DataGridView's data binding approach.

For column properties, I'll convert the Locked assignments to ReadOnly and handle alignment differently since DataGridView doesn't have the same alignment options. The ExportToExcel method needs a custom replacement—I'll implement a tab-delimited text export similar to what was used in the REAR projects migration.

I should also check Module1.vb to see what utilities or constants are defined there.

Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frm_Main

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화
    '******************************************************************************
    Public Sub New()

        InitializeComponent()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        ComboBox1.Items.Add("LH")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("RH")

        ComboBox1.Text = "LH"

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        If ComboBox1.Text = "LH" Then
            GetDataSetLH()
        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "RH" Then
            GetDataSetRH()
        End If

        If ComboBox1.Text = "LH" Then
            Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main_LH")
        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "RH" Then
            Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main_RH")
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSetLH()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.100;Initial Catalog=NX4_RR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main_LH")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub
    Private Sub GetDataSetRH()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.100;Initial Catalog=NX4_RR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main_RH")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim excelDir As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel"
        Dim filePath As String = excelDir & "\" & excel_name & ".xls"

        If Not Directory.Exists(excelDir) Then
            Directory.CreateDirectory(excelDir)
        End If

        Using sw As New StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            ' 헤더
            For i As Integer = 0 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                If i > 0 Then sw.Write(vbTab)
                sw.Write(Grid1.Columns(i).HeaderText)
            Next
            sw.WriteLine()

            ' 데이터
            For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                For i As Integer = 0 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                    If i > 0 Then sw.Write(vbTab)
                    If row.Cells(i).Value IsNot Nothing Then
                        sw.Write(row.Cells(i).Value.ToString())
                    End If
                Next
                sw.WriteLine()
            Next
        End Using

        MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

        ComboBox1.Text = "LH"

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        If ComboBox1.Text = "LH" Then
            GetDataSetLH()
        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "RH" Then
            GetDataSetRH()
        End If


        'grid3.NullText = ""
        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        'grid3.ExtendLastCol = True
        If ComboBox1.Text = "LH" Then
            Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main_LH")
        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "RH" Then
            Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main_RH")
        End If


        'grid3.Row(0).Height = 0
        'grid3.Column(1).Locked = True
        'grid3.Column(2).Locked = True

        For i As Integer = 1 To 17
            Grid1.Column(i).Locked = True
            Grid1.Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.LeftCenter
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSetLH()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.100;Initial Catalog=NX4_RR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main_LH")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub
    Private Sub GetDataSetRH()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.100;Initial Catalog=NX4_RR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main_RH")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")

        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

        End If

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frm_Main

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화    
    '******************************************************************************
    Public Sub New()

        InitializeComponent()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AE")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("PD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("CN7")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("ALL")

        ComboBox1.Text = "ALL"

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()

        'grid3.NullText = ""
        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        'grid3.ExtendLastCol = True
        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")

        'grid3.Row(0).Height = 0
        'grid3.Column(1).Locked = True
        'grid3.Column(2).Locked = True

        For i As Integer = 1 To 17
            Grid1.Column(i).Locked = True
            Grid1.Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.LeftCenter
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        If ComboBox1.Text = "ALL" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "CN7" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AE" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "PD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        End If

        
        'If LINE_POSITION = "LH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.221\SP2I_FRT_LH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_LH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'ElseIf LINE_POSITION = "RH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.239\SP2I_FRT_RH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_RH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'End If

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR;Initial Catalog=CN7_FRT;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")

        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

        End If

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

1→Imports System.ComponentModel
     2→Imports System.Data.OleDb
     3→Imports System.IO
     4→
     5→Public Class Frm_Main
     6→
     7→    '******************************************************************************
     8→    '변수
     9→    '******************************************************************************
    10→    Private mstrDatabase As String
    11→    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    12→    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    13→    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    14→    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    15→    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    16→    '******************************************************************************
    17→    '초기화    
    18→    '******************************************************************************
    19→    Public Sub New()
    20→
    21→        InitializeComponent()
    22→        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.
    23→
    24→        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AD")
    25→        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AE")
    26→        ComboBox1.Items.Add("PD")
    27→        ComboBox1.Items.Add("CN7")
    28→        ComboBox1.Items.Add("ALL")
    29→
    30→        ComboBox1.Text = "ALL"
    31→
    32→    End Sub
    33→
    34→    '******************************************************************************
    35→    'Dataset handling
    36→    '******************************************************************************
    37→    Private Sub SetDataBinding()
    38→
    39→        GetDataSet()
    40→
    41→        'grid3.NullText = ""
    42→        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
    43→        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D
    44→
    45→        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
    46→        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
    47→        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
    48→        'grid3.ExtendLastCol = True
    49→        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
    50→
    51→        'grid3.Row(0).Height = 0
    52→        'grid3.Column(1).Locked = True
    53→        'grid3.Column(2).Locked = True
    54→
    55→        For i As Integer = 1 To 17
    56→            Grid1.Column(i).Locked = True
    57→            Grid1.Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.LeftCenter
    58→        Next
    59→
    60→    End Sub
    61→
    62→    Private Sub GetDataSet()
    63→
    64→        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
    65→        Dim Qurry1 As String
    66→        Dim Qurry2 As String
    67→
    68→        If ComboBox1.Text = "ALL" Then
    69→
    70→            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    71→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"
    72→
    73→            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    74→                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"
    75→
    76→        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "CN7" Then
    77→
    78→            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    79→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"
    80→
    81→            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    82→                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"
    83→

Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frm_Main

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화    
    '******************************************************************************
    Public Sub New()

        InitializeComponent()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AE")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("PD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("CN7")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("ALL")

        ComboBox1.Text = "ALL"

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()

        'grid3.NullText = ""
        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        'grid3.ExtendLastCol = True
        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")

        'grid3.Row(0).Height = 0
        'grid3.Column(1).Locked = True
        'grid3.Column(2).Locked = True

        For i As Integer = 1 To 17
            Grid1.Column(i).Locked = True
            Grid1.Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.LeftCenter
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        If ComboBox1.Text = "ALL" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "CN7" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AE" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "PD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        End If

        
        'If LINE_POSITION = "LH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.221\SP2I_FRT_LH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_LH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'ElseIf LINE_POSITION = "RH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.239\SP2I_FRT_RH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_RH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'End If

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR;Initial Catalog=CN7_FRT;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")

        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

        End If

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frm_Main

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화
    '******************************************************************************
    Public Sub New()

        InitializeComponent()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AE")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("PD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("CN7")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("ALL")

        ComboBox1.Text = "ALL"

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()

        Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main")

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        If ComboBox1.Text = "ALL" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "CN7" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AE" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "PD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        End If


        'If LINE_POSITION = "LH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.221\SP2I_FRT_LH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_LH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'ElseIf LINE_POSITION = "RH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.239\SP2I_FRT_RH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_RH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'End If

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR;Initial Catalog=CN7_FRT;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim excelDir As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel"
        Dim filePath As String = excelDir & "\" & excel_name & ".xls"

        If Not Directory.Exists(excelDir) Then
            Directory.CreateDirectory(excelDir)
        End If

        Using sw As New StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            ' 헤더
            For i As Integer = 0 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                If i > 0 Then sw.Write(vbTab)
                sw.Write(Grid1.Columns(i).HeaderText)
            Next
            sw.WriteLine()

            ' 데이터
            For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                For i As Integer = 0 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                    If i > 0 Then sw.Write(vbTab)
                    If row.Cells(i).Value IsNot Nothing Then
                        sw.Write(row.Cells(i).Value.ToString())
                    End If
                Next
                sw.WriteLine()
            Next
        End Using

        MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

        Dim Qurry2 As String

                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

        End If


        'If LINE_POSITION = "LH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.221\SP2I_FRT_LH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_LH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'ElseIf LINE_POSITION = "RH" Then

        'End If

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR;Initial Catalog=CN7_FRT;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim excelDir As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel"
        Dim filePath As String = excelDir & "\" & excel_name & ".xls"

        If Not Directory.Exists(excelDir) Then
            Directory.CreateDirectory(excelDir)
        End If

        Using sw As New StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            ' 헤더
            For i As Integer = 0 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                If i > 0 Then sw.Write(vbTab)
                sw.Write(Grid1.Columns(i).HeaderText)
            Next
            sw.WriteLine()

            ' 데이터
            For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                For i As Integer = 0 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                    If i > 0 Then sw.Write(vbTab)
                    If row.Cells(i).Value IsNot Nothing Then
                        sw.Write(row.Cells(i).Value.ToString())
                    End If
                Next
                sw.WriteLine()
            Next
        End Using

        MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection

        Dim Qurry2 As String

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")

        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

        End If

    End Sub

    End Sub

        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frm_Main

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화
    '******************************************************************************
    Public Sub New()

        InitializeComponent()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AE")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("PD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("CN7")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("ALL")

        ComboBox1.Text = "ALL"

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()

        Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main")

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        If ComboBox1.Text = "ALL" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "CN7" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AE" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "PD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        End If


        'If LINE_POSITION = "LH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.221\SP2I_FRT_LH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_LH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'ElseIf LINE_POSITION = "RH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.239\SP2I_FRT_RH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_RH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'End If

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR;Initial Catalog=CN7_FRT;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim excelDir As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel"
        Dim filePath As String = excelDir & "\" & excel_name & ".xls"

        If Not Directory.Exists(excelDir) Then
            Directory.CreateDirectory(excelDir)
        End If

        Using sw As New StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            ' 헤더
            For i As Integer = 0 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                If i > 0 Then sw.Write(vbTab)
                sw.Write(Grid1.Columns(i).HeaderText)
            Next
            sw.WriteLine()

            ' 데이터
            For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                For i As Integer = 0 To Grid1.Columns.Count - 1
                    If i > 0 Then sw.Write(vbTab)
                    If row.Cells(i).Value IsNot Nothing Then
                        sw.Write(row.Cells(i).Value.ToString())
                    End If
                Next
                sw.WriteLine()
            Next
        End Using

        MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

﻿Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data.OleDb
Imports System.IO

Public Class Frm_Main

    '******************************************************************************
    '변수
    '******************************************************************************
    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    Private mstrDatabase2 As String
    Private myDataAdapter2 As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet2 As DataSet
    '******************************************************************************
    '초기화    
    '******************************************************************************
    Public Sub New()

        InitializeComponent()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("AE")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("PD")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("CN7")
        ComboBox1.Items.Add("ALL")

        ComboBox1.Text = "ALL"

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Dataset handling
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        GetDataSet()

        'grid3.NullText = ""
        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        'grid3.ExtendLastCol = True
        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")

        'grid3.Row(0).Height = 0
        'grid3.Column(1).Locked = True
        'grid3.Column(2).Locked = True

        For i As Integer = 1 To 17
            Grid1.Column(i).Locked = True
            Grid1.Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.LeftCenter
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
        Dim Qurry1 As String
        Dim Qurry2 As String

        If ComboBox1.Text = "ALL" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "CN7" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'CN7' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "AE" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'AE' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        ElseIf ComboBox1.Text = "PD" Then

            Qurry1 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                                    "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"

            Qurry2 = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE PART_TYPE = 'PD' AND (ST01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
                            "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND ( LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"

        End If

        
        'If LINE_POSITION = "LH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.221\SP2I_FRT_LH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_LH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'ElseIf LINE_POSITION = "RH" Then
        '    connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.239\SP2I_FRT_RH;Initial Catalog=SP2I_FRT_RH;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
        'End If

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR;Initial Catalog=CN7_FRT;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet
        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        Else
            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
        End If

        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ConvertExcel()

        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")

        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

        End If

    End Sub

    '******************************************************************************
    'Button
    '******************************************************************************
    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        SetDataBinding()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        ConvertExcel()
    End Sub

End Class

content.text:
완료. 3개 SERVER SEARCH 프로젝트 전부 FlexCell 제거 완료.

**변경 요약:**

| 프로젝트 | 파일 | 변경 |
|---------|------|------|
| `SERVER SEARCH\` (NX4_RR) | FrmMain.vb | FlexCell API → DataGridView API |
| | FrmMain.Designer.vb | `FlexCell.Grid` → `DataGridView` |
| | SERVEr Search.vbproj | FlexCell 참조 제거 |
| `NX4_WELD\SERVER SEARCH\` (CN7_FRT) | 동일 3개 파일 | 동일 변경 |
| `NX4_Front_Ver.Server\...\SERVER SEARCH\` | 동일 3개 파일 | 동일 변경 |

**주요 변환:**
- `FlexCell.Grid` → `System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`
- `Grid1.SetDataBinding(dataset, table)` → `Grid1.DataSource = dataset.Tables(table)`
- `Grid1.BoldFixedCell/DisplayFocusRect/DisplayRowArrow` → 제거
- `Grid1.Column(i).Locked/Alignment` → 제거 (DataGridView에서 ReadOnly=True로 전체 설정)
- `Grid1.ExportToExcel()` → StreamWriter 탭구분 텍스트 Export
- `CheckedImage/UncheckedImage/DefaultFont/DefaultRowHeight` → DataGridView 표준 속성으로 대체
- `.vbproj`에서 `FlexCell v4.3.7.0` 참조 완전 제거

   453→                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
   454→                    DingDOng()
   455→                End If
   456→
   457→            ' HANESS 바코드 판정
   458→            ElseIf ScanData.Contains(srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
   459→                If srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
   460→                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
   461→                ElseIf FLAG_HANESS_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_HANESS_SN", ScanData) = True Then
   462→                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
   463→                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
   464→                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
   465→                    NG()
   466→                Else
   467→                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
   468→                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
   469→                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
   470→                    DingDOng()
   471→                End If
   472→
   473→            ' 프레임 바코드 판정
   474→            ElseIf srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text <> "" AndAlso ScanData.Contains(srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
   475→                If srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Then
   476→                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
   477→                Else
   478→                    srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = ScanData
   479→                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
   480→                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
   481→                    DingDOng()
   482→                End If
   483→
   484→            Else
   485→                NG()
   486→            End If
   487→
   488→        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then
   489→
   490→            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) >= 10 Then
   491→                Init_Control()
   492→                Load_PArt(Label_Scanner.Text)
   493→                '3.1
   494→            End If
   495→
   496→        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then
   497→
   498→            If Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("NNB") Then
   499→                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.Black
   500→                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.White
   501→                PRODUCT_COLOR = "NNB"
   502→                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
   503→                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
   504→                wStep = 3.3
   505→            ElseIf Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("WDN") Then
   506→                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.White
   507→                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.Black
   508→                PRODUCT_COLOR = "WDN"
   509→                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
   510→                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
   511→                wStep = 3.3
   512→            Else
   513→                NG()
   514→            End If
   515→
   516→        End If
   517→
   518→    End Sub

   768→    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String
   769→
   770→        Dim tmp As String
   771→
   772→        If str = "ON" Then
   773→            tmp = ""
   774→        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
   775→            tmp = ""
   776→        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
   777→            tmp = "PASS"
   778→        End If
   779→
   780→        Return tmp
   781→
   782→    End Function
   783→
   784→    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer
   785→
   786→        Dim tmp As Integer
   787→
   788→        If str = "ON" Then
   789→            tmp = 1
   790→        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
   791→            tmp = 0
   792→        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
   793→            tmp = 100
   794→        End If
   795→
   796→        Return tmp
   797→
   798→    End Function

   800→    Private Sub Read_RFiD()
   801→
   802→        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
   803→            ' PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령 (8바이트)
   804→            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
   805→            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
   806→        End If
   807→
   808→    End Sub
   809→
   810→    Private Sub ThreadTask1()
   811→
   812→        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
   813→
   814→        Do
   815→            Try
   816→
   817→                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
   818→                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
   819→                Else
   820→                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
   821→                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
   822→                        Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
   823→
   824→                        '02 02 09 07 E0040 181D1 687B0 3 ' 8 + 16
   825→                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
   826→                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
   827→                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
   828→                                Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
   829→                                ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
   830→                                RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
   831→                            Else
   832→                                Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
   833→                            End If
   834→                        Else
   835→                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
   836→                        End If
   837→                        sRecvData = ""
   838→                    End If
   839→                End If
   840→
   841→            Catch ex As Exception
   842→
   843→                Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
   844→                sRecvData = ""
   845→
   846→            End Try
   847→
   848→        Loop
   849→
   850→    End Sub
   851→
   852→    Private Sub ThreadTask2()
   853→
   854→        Dim Incoming1 As String
   855→        Dim ToolData As Double
   856→
   857→        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True
   858→
   859→            Try
   860→
   861→                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then
   862→
   863→                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar
   864→                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then
   865→
   866→                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
   867→                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   868→                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
   869→                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   870→                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
   871→                            Tool_Connection = True
   872→                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
   873→                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
   874→                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))
   875→                            label_Message.Text = ToolData.ToString()
   876→
   877→                            If wStep = 9 Then
   878→
   879→                                ' 이미 판정 완료된 경우 무시
   880→                                If srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "OK" AndAlso srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "NA" AndAlso srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "PASS" Then
   881→                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ToolData
   882→
   883→                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
   884→                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK"
   885→                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
   886→                                        DingDOng()
   887→                                    Else
   888→                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NG"
   889→                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
   890→                                        NG()
   891→                                    End If
   892→                                End If
   893→
   894→                            End If
   895→
   896→                        End If
   897→
   898→                        Tool_String = ""
   899→                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()
   900→
   901→                    Else
   902→
   903→                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)
   904→
   905→                    End If
   906→
   907→                End If
   908→
   909→            Catch ex As Exception
   910→
   911→                Incoming1 = ""
   912→                Tool_String = ""
   913→            End Try
   914→
   915→            Application.DoEvents()
   916→
   917→        Loop
   918→
   919→    End Sub
   920→
   921→    'Private Sub ThreadTask3()
   922→
   923→    '    Dim Incoming1 As String

Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String
        Dim s As String
        Dim Tmp As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        s = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 1, 23)

        If wStep = 9 Then

            ' INR BUCKLE 바코드 판정
            If ScanData.Contains(srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" OrElse srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" OrElse srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_INR_BUCKLE_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ' HANESS 바코드 판정
            ElseIf ScanData.Contains(srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_HANESS_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_HANESS_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ' 프레임 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text <> "" AndAlso ScanData.Contains(srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                Else
                    srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            Else
                NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) >= 10 Then
                Init_Control()
                Load_PArt(Label_Scanner.Text)
                '3.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

            If Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("NNB") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.White
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "NNB"
                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
                wStep = 3.3
            ElseIf Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("WDN") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.White
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.Black
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "WDN"
                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
                wStep = 3.3
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            ' PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령 (8바이트)
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()

                        '02 02 09 07 E0040 181D1 687B0 3 ' 8 + 16
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                                ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                                RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                sRecvData = ""

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))
                            label_Message.Text = ToolData.ToString()

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                ' 이미 판정 완료된 경우 무시
                                If srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "OK" AndAlso srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "NA" AndAlso srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "PASS" Then
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ToolData

                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

Now I see the current scan logic at line 439-516. Let me understand the current structure:

```vb
If wStep = 9 Then
    ' INR BUCKLE
    If ScanData.Contains(srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
        If srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" OrElse ... "NA" ... "PASS" Then
            ' 무시
        ElseIf FLAG_INR_BUCKLE_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate(...) Then
            ' 중복
        Else
            ' OK
        End If
    ' HANESS
    ElseIf ScanData.Contains(srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
        If srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse ... "NA" ... "PASS" Then
            ' 무시
        ElseIf FLAG_HANESS_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate(...) Then
            ' 중복
        Else
            ' OK
        End If
    ' FRAME
    ElseIf srcFRAME_BArcode_
```

Continuing with the conditional structure... I see the issue now—the current structure checks for NA/PASS status before validating whether the barcode is even in the scan data, which means it could skip processing valid entries. The user wants the Contains check to happen first as the main branching logic, then inside each branch, check if it's already marked as NA or PASS to skip redundant processing. the targets are set up in the Load_Part function to see when they might be empty. The real issue is that when a target text field is empty, the Contains check will always return true for any scan data, which means the first branch catches everything regardless of what was actually scanned. The fix is to add a check ensuring the target isn't empty before doing the Contains comparison, similar to how the FRAME check already validates `srcFRAME_Barcode_Target.Text <> ""`.
