    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private TmpFrameBarcode As String

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal targetname As String, ByVal strdata As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & targetname & " = '" & strdata & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String
        Dim s As String
        Dim tmp1, tmp2 As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        s = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 1, 23)
        Label3.Text = s

        If wStep = 9 Then

            ' CTR BUCKLE 바코드 판정
            If srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_CTR_BUCKLE_DUP And CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST01_CTR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ' INR BUCKLE 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_INR_BUCKLE_DUP And CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ' 프레임 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                Else
                    srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            Else
                NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) >= 10 Then
                Init_Control()
                'Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                Load_PArt(Label_Scanner.Text)
                '3.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

            If Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("NNB") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.White
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "NNB"
                tmp1 = srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                tmp2 = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = tmp1
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = tmp2
                wStep = 4
            ElseIf Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("WDN") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.White
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.Black
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "WDN"
                tmp1 = srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                tmp2 = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = tmp1
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = tmp2
                wStep = 4
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            srcPartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            srcPartName.Text = Replace(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value, " ", "")
            Dim tmp As String

            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)
            Next

            srcPartName.Text = tmp
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

            OptionSAb = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value
            OPTION_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
            OPTION_CAR_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_COUNTRY = Rs.Fields("OPTION_COUNTRY").Value

            OPTION_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_WS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_WS").Value)
            OPTION_CTR_TETHER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CTR_TETHER").Value)
            OPTION_HEATER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value)
            OPTION_REMOTE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_REMOTE").Value)
            OPTION_CLR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CLR").Value)

            TARGET_SEAT_BELT_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("SEAT_BELT_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_HANESS_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_ECU_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

            ' CAR 컬럼 읽기 (NX4 또는 NX5)
            Try
                OPTION_CAR = Trim(Rs.Fields("CAR").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                OPTION_CAR = ""
            End Try

            ' TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE 컬럼 읽기
            Try
                TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = Trim(Rs.Fields("TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE").Value)
                If IsDBNull(Rs.Fields("TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE").Value) Then
                    TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = ""
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = ""
            End Try

            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcSAB.ForeColor = Color.White
            End If
            If OPTION_WS = 1 Then
                srcWS.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcWS.BackColor = Color.White
            End If
            If OPTION_CTR_TETHER = 1 Then
                srcCTR_TETHER.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCTR_TETHER.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_HEATER = 1 Then
                srcHEATER.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcHEATER.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then
                srcREMOTE.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcREMOTE.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CLR = 1 Then
                srcCLR.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCLR.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            TARGET_SEAT_BELT_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("SEAT_BELT_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_HANESS_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_ECU_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)


            If TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN <> "0" Then
                If FUNCTION_BUCKLE_TQ = True Then

                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ""
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = ""
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT

                Else

                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = "PASS"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT

                End If

                If FUNCTION_BUCKLE_SERIAL = True Then

                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ""
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = ""
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

                Else

                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = "PASS"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

                End If
            End If

            If TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN <> "0" Then
                If FUNCTION_BUCKLE_TQ = True Then

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT

                Else

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = "PASS"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT

                End If

                If FUNCTION_BUCKLE_SERIAL = True Then

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

                Else

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = "PASS"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

                End If
            End If

            If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("DOMESTIC") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("NORTH AMERICA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.Black
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            ' 프레임 바코드 타겟 설정 (null 또는 "0"이면 NA)
            If TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = "" Or TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = "0" Then
                srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = "NA"
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text = ""
            Else
                srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = ""
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text = TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE
            End If

            wStep = 3.1

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            ' PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령 (8바이트)
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()


                        '02 02 09 07 E0040 181D1 687B0 3 ' 8 + 16
                        'TextBox1.AppendText(sRecvData.ToString & vbCrLf)
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                                RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                sRecvData = ""
                Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))
                            label_Message.Text = ToolData.ToString()

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                ' 이미 판정 완료된 경우 무시
                                If srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "OK" And srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "NA" And srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "PASS" Then
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ToolData

                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private rrCount As Double
    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        If StepResistOK = 1 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4061", "1")
            rrCount = 0
            StepResistOK = 2
        ElseIf StepResistOK = 2 Then
            rrCount = rrCount + 0.1
            If rrCount > 1 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4061", "0")
                StepResistOK = 3
            End If
        ElseIf StepResistOK = 3 Then
            StepResistOK = 0
        End If

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then '원본
        If PLC(4000) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then 'D4000
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
            'Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Else
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then '원본
            If PLC(4000) = 1 And PLC(4001) = 1 Then 'D4000, D4001
                ' RFID 데이터 있을 때만 작업 시작
                If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                    DeletePallet(RFID_TAG_ID) ' 기존 매핑 삭제
                    wStep = 2
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            'Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then '사양 스캔 대기

            'WORK_PARTNO = ""
            'Check_Now()
            'wStep = 3.1

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then '사양 스캔 완료
            wStep = 4
        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then '칼라스캔 대기

        ElseIf wStep = 3.3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "4" ' NX5 & HEV
                Else
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3" ' NX4 & HEV
                End If
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "5" ' NX5 & ICE
            End If
            If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "0"
            End If
            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "0"
            End If

            ' CAR 타입 (NX4=1, NX5=2) - 인덱스 5 (6번째 문자)
            If OPTION_CAR = "NX4" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "0"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", PLC_STRING)
            StepResistOK = 0
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 Then '원본
            'If PLC(4050) = 1 Then 'D4050
            '    wStep = 6
            'Else
            '    wStep = 4
            'End If
            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' 버클 스캔 및 토크 작업
            If Resist_Send = False And Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" And Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "NA" Then 'SAB Resist
                Request_Resist()
                Resist_Send = True
            End If
            If ResistUse = False Then
                Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA"
                Label_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If
            If OptionSAb = "0" Then
                Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA"
                Label_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If
            If (srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK" Or Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA") And
                (srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 10
            End If

            'ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            '    If (srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
            '        (srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS") Then
            '        srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            '        srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
            '        wStep = 11
            '    End If
        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            If Resist_Send = False Then
                Request_Resist()
                Resist_Send = True
                lblResistError.Visible = True
            End If
            If lblResist.Text = "No Connection" Then
                lblResistError.Visible = False
                wStep = 11
            Else

            End If
        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4051", "1")
            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then '원본
            'If PLC(4051) = 1 Then 'D4051
            '    wStep = 13
            'Else
            '    wStep = 11
            'End If
            wStep = 13

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then '원본
            If PLC(4002) = 1 Then 'D4002
                wStep = 13.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then

            ' DB에 태그ID-시리얼 매핑 저장 (RFID 데이터 있을 때만)
            If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If
            Tmr_Count = 0
            wStep = 13.2

        ElseIf wStep = 13.2 Then

            Tmr_Count = Tmr_Count + 0.1
            If Tmr_Count >= 0.3 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4058", "1")
                wStep = 14
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            Save_DB()
            RFID_TAG_ID = ""
            AddGrid(srcPartNo.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR)
            InitGrid()

            'If PLC_VALUE(2) = 0 Then '원본
            If PLC(4002) = 0 Then 'D4002
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    ' DB에서 태그ID 매핑 삭제
    Private Sub DeletePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' DB에 태그ID-시리얼 매핑 저장
    Private Sub SavePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String, ByVal strSerial As String)
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("PalletID").Value = strPalletID
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean
        AppMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "NX4_REAR_RH_ST01", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "RH_ST01", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            Application.Exit()
            Return
        End If

        ' Updater Agent 시작 (미실행 시에만)
        Try
            If Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent").Length = 0 Then
                Dim agentPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "Updater_Agent.exe")
                If System.IO.File.Exists(agentPath) Then
                    Process.Start(agentPath)
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        'Init_Grid()
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        EnsureIndexes()
        SerialOpen()

        ' PLC 통신 컨트롤 생성
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
        Me.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.140"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4000" & vbLf &
                                "D4001" & vbLf &
                                "D4002" & vbLf &
                                "D4003" & vbLf &
                                "D4004" & vbLf &
                                "D4005" & vbLf &
                                "D4006" & vbLf &
                                "D4007" & vbLf &
                                "D4008" & vbLf &
                                "D4009" & vbLf &
                                "D4010" & vbLf &
                                "D4011" & vbLf &
                                "D4050" & vbLf &
                                "D4051" & vbLf &
                                "D4052" & vbLf &
                                "D4053" & vbLf &
                                "D4054" & vbLf &
                                "D4055" & vbLf &
                                "D4056" & vbLf &
                                "D4057" & vbLf &
                                "D4058" & vbLf &
                                "D4059" & vbLf &
                                "D4060" & vbLf &
                                "D4061"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LampOK()

        Const C_index As Byte = 0
        Const C_type As Byte = 0

        Const D_not As Short = 100 ' Don't care  // Do not change before state
        Const C_lampoff As Byte = 0
        Const C_lampon As Byte = 1
        Const C_lampblink As Byte = 2

        Dim b_in As Boolean
        Dim b_vb As Boolean

        Dim bData(17) As Byte

        bData(0) = C_lampoff ' Red
        bData(1) = C_lampoff ' Yellow
        bData(2) = C_lampon ' Green
        'bData(3) = C_lampon ' Blue
        'bData(4) = C_lampblink ' White

        ' Sound      0-(off)   1-4(Sound select)
        ' Else ' Don't care   Do not change before state
        bData(5) = 0

        b_in = Usb_Qu_write(0, 0, bData(0))

        If b_in = 0 Then
            b_vb = False
        Else
            b_vb = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With GridCount

            .SuspendLayout()
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            ' 컬럼 추가
            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "품번")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "생산수량")

            ' 컬럼 설정
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 240
            .Columns(2).Width = 150

            For i As Integer = 0 To 2
                .Columns(i).DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                .Columns(i).DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 24.0!, FontStyle.Bold)
                .Columns(i).SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

            ' 헤더 스타일
            .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
            .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 24.0!, FontStyle.Bold)
            .ColumnHeadersHeight = 45

            .ResumeLayout()

        End With

    End Sub


    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT JObPartNo,JobCount FROM Table_Count ORDER BY LEN(JobPartNo),JobPartNo", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            Rs.MoveFirst()

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF

                    GridCount.Rows.Add("", Rs.Fields("JobPartNo").Value, Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End If

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ResetGrid()

        Dim strSQL As String

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        strSQL = "DELETE * FROM TABLE_COUNT"
        Mdb_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub AddGrid(strPart As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpInt As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Count WHERE JobPartNo = '" & strPart & "'", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

            Rs.AddNew()

            Rs.Fields("JobPartno").Value = strPart
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = "1"
            Rs.Update()

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            TmpInt = CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
            TmpInt = TmpInt + 1
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = CStr(TmpInt)
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private StepResistOK As Integer

    Private Sub Serial_Resist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Resist.DataReceived
        Dim Incoming3 As String
        Dim tmp As String

        Incoming3 = Serial_Resist.ReadLine()
        Serial_Resist.DiscardInBuffer()

        tmp = Mid$(Incoming3, 1, Len(Incoming3) - 1)

        If wStep = 9 Then
            If Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" Then

                If Resist_Send = True Then

                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                        'LABEL_Resist.Text = "No Connection"
                    Else
                        If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                            Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
                            LABEL_Resist.Text = Format(Resist_Value + RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                            lblResist.Text = LABEL_Resist.Text
                        ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                            Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
                            LABEL_Resist.Text = Format(Resist_Value + RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                            lblResist.Text = LABEL_Resist.Text
                        End If

                        'If (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) >= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) <= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX) Then
                        Try
                            If (CDbl(LABEL_Resist.Text) >= RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(LABEL_Resist.Text) <= RESIST_MAX) Then
                                DingDOng()
                                Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                Label_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                StepResistOK = 1
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try

                    End If
                    Resist_Send = False
                End If

            End If
        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            If Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK" Or Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA" Then
                If Resist_Send = True Then
                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                        lblResist.Text = "No Connection"
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                        Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
                        lblResist.Text = Format(Resist_Value + RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                        Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
                        lblResist.Text = Format(Resist_Value + RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                    Else
                        lblResist.Text = "No Connection"
                    End If
                    Resist_Send = False
                End If
            End If
        End If
        
    End Sub

        Read_RFiD()
    End Sub

        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2

        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
        Dim dlg As New Form()
        Dim txt As New TextBox()
        Dim okBtn As New Button()
        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
        lbl.AutoSize = True
        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
        okBtn.Text = "확인"
        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
        Dim input As String = txt.Text

        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()
            frm.ShowDialog()
            LoadFProofFlags()
        Else
            MessageBox.Show("비밀번호가 틀렸습니다.", "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End If
    End Sub

        ' Updater Agent 종료
        Try

    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1()

        Dim buffsize As Integer
        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
        Dim temp1 As String = ""
        Dim ToolData As Double
        Dim ToolDecision As String

        Do
            Try
                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
                Next i
                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
                        ToolDecision = "OK"
                    Else
                        ToolDecision = "NG"
                    End If
                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))

                    If wStep = 6 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        End If

                    End If

                End If
                temp1 = ""
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private ClientSocketTool1 As New System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient
    Private Tool1ConnectionStep As Single
    Private FlagTool1Connection As Single
    Private Tool1AliveCount As Double

    Sub SerialOpen()

        If CheckPing(ToolIP) = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
            tMRtool1.Interval = 100
            tMRtool1.Start()
        Else
            MsgBox("IP TOOL ERROR")
        End If

        Try
            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID1.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID1 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID1)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal targetname As String, ByVal strdata As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & targetname & " = '" & strdata & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 6 Then

            'If srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" And srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text <> "NA" Then
            '    strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN_RH SET " &
            '        "ST02_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
            '        "ST02_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
            '        "ST02_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
            '        "ST02_BELT_TQ = '" & srcSEAT_BELT_TQ1.Text & "'," &
            '        "ST02_BELT_SN = '" & srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text & "'," &
            '        "ST02_HANESS_SN = '" & srcHANESS_BArcode.Text & "'," &
            '        "SAB_SERIAL = '" & C.Text & "'," &
            '        "SAB_TQ1 = '" & srcSAB_TQ1.Text & "'," &
            '        "SAB_TQ2 = '" & srcSAB_TQ2.Text & "'," &
            '        "ST02_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "' " &
            '        "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"
            'Else
            '    strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN_RH SET " &
            '        "ST02_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
            '        "ST02_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
            '        "ST02_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
            '        "ST02_BELT_TQ = '" & srcSEAT_BELT_TQ1.Text & "'," &
            '        "ST02_BELT_SN = '" & srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text & "'," &
            '        "ST02_HANESS_SN = '" & srcHANESS_BArcode.Text & "'," &
            '        "ST02_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "' " &
            '        "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"
            'End If

            ' HANESS 바코드 판정
            If srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text <> "0" AndAlso ScanData.Contains(srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_HANESS_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST02_HANESS_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ' SEAT BELT 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_Target.Text <> "0" AndAlso ScanData.Contains(srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_BELT_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST02_BELT_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ' SAB 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text <> "0" AndAlso ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_SAB_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) = True Then
                    C.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    C.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private OptionSAb As String

    Private Sub Load_Part1_Color(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            If Rs.Fields("ST01_COLOR").Value = srcColorNNB2.Text Then
                srcColorNNB2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcColorWDN2.BackColor = Color.White
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "NNB"
            Else
                srcColorNNB2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcColorWDN2.BackColor = Color.Black
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "WDN"
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt1(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            OPTION_SEATBELT_STARTIC = Rs.Fields("OPTION_SEATBELT_STARTIC").Value
            OptionSAb = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value
            srcPartNo2.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            srcPartName2.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)

            Dim tmp As String

            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName2.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)
            Next

            srcPartName2.Text = tmp

            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcSAB.ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.White
                srcSAB.ForeColor = Color.White
            End If

            OPTION2_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
            OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION2_COUNTRY = Rs.Fields("OPTION_COUNTRY").Value

            OPTION2_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION2_WS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_WS").Value)
            OPTION2_CTR_TETHER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CTR_TETHER").Value)
            OPTION2_HEATER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value)
            OPTION2_REMOTE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_REMOTE").Value)
            OPTION2_CLR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CLR").Value)

            ' CAR 컬럼 읽기 (NX4 또는 NX5)
            Try
                OPTION_CAR = Trim(Rs.Fields("CAR").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                OPTION_CAR = ""
            End Try

            If OPTION2_WS = 1 Then
                srcWS2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcWS2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_CTR_TETHER = 1 Then
                srcCTR_TETHER2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCTR_TETHER2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_HEATER = 1 Then
                srcHEATER2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcHEATER2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_REMOTE = 1 Then
                srcREMOTE2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcREMOTE2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_CLR = 1 Then
                srcCLR2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCLR2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            If OPTION2_LHRH = "LH" Then
                srcLH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_LHRH = "RH" Then
                srcRH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("DOMESTIC") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("NORTH AMERICA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                ' NX5는 모든 차종에서 SAB 수행
                If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text = OptionSAb
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                ' NX4 DIVE만 SAB 수행
                If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text = OptionSAb
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
            Else
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If

            If FUNCTION_SEAT_BELT_SERIAL = True Then

                If srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text = "0" Then
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                Else
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text = ""
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("SEAT_BELT_SERIAL").Value)

                End If

            Else

                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode.Text = "PASS"
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcSEAT_BELT_BArcode_Target.Text = "PASS"

            End If

            If FUNCTION_SEAT_BELT_TQ = True Then

                srcSEAT_BELT_TQ_DEc.Text = ""
                srcSEAT_BELT_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                srcSEAT_BELT_TQ1.Text = ""
            Else

                srcSEAT_BELT_TQ_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                srcSEAT_BELT_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcSEAT_BELT_TQ1.Text = "PASS"

            End If

            If FUNCTION_HANESS_SERIAL = True Then
                srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
                If srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text = "0" Then
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                Else
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ""
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                End If
            Else
                srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = "PASS"
                srcHANESS_BArcode.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If

            srcSEAT_BELT_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_SEAT_BELT_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_SEAT_BELT_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_SEAT_BELT_TQ_UNIT
            srcSAB_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_SAB_TQ_UNIT
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 34 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 34 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then Serial_RFID1.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE WORK_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Mdb_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo2.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

        Return tmp

    End Function
