    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal strData As String, ByVal TargetName As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & TargetName & " = '" & strData & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 6 Then

            'strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN_RH SET " &
            '        "ST03_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
            '        "ST03_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
            '        "ST03_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
            '        "ST03_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "'," &
            '        "END_BARCODE = '" & label_Message.Text & "' " &
            '        "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"

            ' ECU 바코드 판정
            If ScanData.Contains(srcECU_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                Else
                    srcECU_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        Else

            label_Message.Text = "Reset Need"

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN," & CStr(BarcodeSize) & ",200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,240^A0N,40,20^FD" & Trim(srcPartName2.Text) & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Part_Color(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            If Rs.Fields("ST01_COLOR").Value = srcColorNNB2.Text Then
                PART_COLOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("ST01_COLOR").Value)
                srcColorNNB2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcColorWDN2.BackColor = Color.White
            Else
                PART_COLOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("ST01_COLOR").Value)
                srcColorNNB2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcColorWDN2.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
        End If

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private OptionSAB As String

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            srcPartNo2.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            srcPartName2.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            OptionSAB = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value

            If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            Dim tmp As String

            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName2.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)
            Next

            srcPartName2.Text = tmp

            OPTION_CHILD_ANCHOR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CHILD_ANCHOR").Value)

            Label3.Text = "Child Anchor : " & OPTION_CHILD_ANCHOR

            OPTION2_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
            OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION2_COUNTRY = Rs.Fields("OPTION_COUNTRY").Value

            OPTION2_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION2_WS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_WS").Value)
            OPTION2_CTR_TETHER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CTR_TETHER").Value)
            OPTION2_HEATER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value)

            Else

            End If

            Else

                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            If OPTION2_LHRH = "LH" Then
                srcLH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_LHRH = "RH" Then
                srcRH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("DOMESTIC") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("NORTH AMERICA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA") Then

                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
            '20200526004589410-N9060'
            srcECU_BArcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

            If FUNCTION_ECU_SERIAL = True Then
                If srcECU_BArcode_Target.Text = "0" Then
                    srcECU_BArcode.Text = "NA"

                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"

                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                End If
            Else

                srcECU_BArcode.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If

            'srcECU_BArcode.Text = "NA"

            wStep = 2
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    ' 전공정(ST01, ST02) 완료 여부 확인
    Private Function CheckPreviousStations(ByVal snStr As String, ByRef ngDetail As String) As Boolean
        Dim result As Boolean = False
        ngDetail = ""
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT ST01_DECISION, ST02_DECISION FROM TABLE_MAIN_RH WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                Try
                    Dim st01 As String = Trim(Rs.Fields("ST01_DECISION").Value)
                    Dim st02 As String = Trim(Rs.Fields("ST02_DECISION").Value)
                    Dim ngList As New List(Of String)
                    If st01 <> "OK" Then ngList.Add("ST01")
                    If st02 <> "OK" Then ngList.Add("ST02")
                    If ngList.Count = 0 Then
                        result = True
                    Else
                        ngDetail = String.Join(",", ngList) & " 미완료"
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                    result = False
                    ngDetail = "데이터 읽기 오류"
                End Try
            Else
                ngDetail = "데이터 없음"
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            Connection_Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            Try
                Connection_Close()
            Catch
            End Try
            ngDetail = "DB 오류"
        End Try
        Return result
    End Function

        Try

            Dim _4M_2 As String = ""

                    "P" & srcPartNo2.Text.Replace("-", "") & GS &

                    "E" & "" & GS &

                    "M" & "" & GS &

                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & CtrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & SeatBeltTmp & RS & EOT

                    BarcodeSize = 4

                End If



            Else

                If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                    TMP =
                    "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                    "V" & "PB30" & GS &
                    "P" & srcPartNo2.Text.Replace("-", "") & GS &
                    "S" & "" & GS &
                    "E" & "" & GS &
                    "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber2.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber2.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                    "M" & "" & GS &
                    "C" & "" & GS &
                    RS & EOT &
                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & InrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & CtrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & SeatBeltTmp & RS & EOT &

                    "P" & srcPartNo2.Text.Replace("-", "") & GS &

                    "E" & "" & GS &
                    "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber2.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber2.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                    "M" & "" & GS &
                    "C" & "" & GS &
                    RS & EOT &
                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & InrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & CtrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & SeatBeltTmp & RS & EOT &
                    "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & EcuTmp & RS & EOT
                    BarcodeSize = 4
                End If

            End If

            label_Message.Text = TMP

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try


        Return TMP

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    ' DB에서 태그ID로 시리얼번호 조회
    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                serial = Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value & ""
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
        Return serial
    End Function

    ' DB에서 팔레트 매핑 삭제
    Private Sub DeletePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean
        AppMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "NX4_REAR_RH_ST03", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "RH_ST03", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            Application.Exit()
            Return
        End If

        ' Updater Agent 시작 (미실행 시에만)
        Try
            If Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent").Length = 0 Then
                Dim agentPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "Updater_Agent.exe")
                If System.IO.File.Exists(agentPath) Then
                    Process.Start(agentPath)
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        EnsureIndexes()
        SerialOpen()

        ' PLC 통신 컨트롤 생성
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
        Me.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.140"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        Read_RFiD1()

        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID1.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID1.DiscardInBuffer()

                        '02 02 09 07 E0040 181D1 687B0 3 ' 8 + 16
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ1.Text = tagId
                                RFID_TAG_ID1 = tagId
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ1.Text = "Empty"
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ1.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sRecvData = ""
                Serial_RFID1.DiscardInBuffer()
            End Try
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD1()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_RFiD1()

        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then
            ' PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령 (8바이트)
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID1.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4200" & vbLf &
                                "D4201" & vbLf &
                                "D4202" & vbLf &
                                "D4203" & vbLf &
                                "D4204" & vbLf &
                                "D4205" & vbLf &
                                "D4206" & vbLf &
                                "D4207" & vbLf &
                                "D4208" & vbLf &
                                "D4209" & vbLf &
                                "D4210" & vbLf &
                                "D4211" & vbLf &
                                "D4250" & vbLf &
                                "D4251" & vbLf &
                                "D4252" & vbLf &
                                "D4253" & vbLf &
                                "D4254" & vbLf &
                                "D4255" & vbLf &
                                "D4256" & vbLf &
                                "D4257" & vbLf &
                                "D4258" & vbLf &
                                "D4259" & vbLf &
                                "D4260" & vbLf &
                                "D4261"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Public Sub BarCode_Print_NX4(ByVal strSerial As String)

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")

        'If NX4_Barcode_Mode = 1 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,6,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'ElseIf NX4_Barcode_Mode = 2 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,5,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'ElseIf NX4_Barcode_Mode = 3 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,4,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'ElseIf NX4_Barcode_Mode = 4 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,3,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'ElseIf NX4_Barcode_Mode = 5 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,2,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN," & CStr(BarcodeSize) & ",200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")
        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & "  AM" & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & "  PM" & "^FS")
        End If
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & Trim(srcPartName2.Text) & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Part Color : " & PART_COLOR & "^FS")

        'If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        'End If

        'If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        'End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub
    Public Sub Force_BarCode_Print_NX4(ByVal strSerial As String, ByVal strPartNo As String, ByVal strPartName As String, ByVal strPartColor As String)

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")


        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,7,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & strPartNo & " AM NX4" & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & strPartNo & " PM NX4" & "^FS")
        End If
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & strPartName & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Part Color : " & strPartColor & "^FS")
        'If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        'End If

        'If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        'End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step2.Text = wStep

        'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then '원본
        If PLC(4200) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then 'D4200
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True

        If wStep = 0 Then
            ' PLC 시작신호 대기 → 시작신호 시점의 RFID 데이터로 LoadPallet
            If PLC(4200) = 1 And PLC(4201) = 1 Then
                If RFID_TAG_ID1.Length = 16 Then
                    Dim serial As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID1)
                    If serial = "" Then
                        ' 매핑 없음 - 대기
                    ElseIf FLAG_COMPLETED_CHECK AndAlso CheckCompleted(serial) = True Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep = 100
                    Else
                        Init_Control()
                        srcSerialNumber2.Text = serial
                        Load_PArt(Mid(serial, 13))
                        ' 전공정 체크
                        If FLAG_PREV_CHECK Then
                            Dim ngDetail As String = ""
                            If CheckPreviousStations(serial, ngDetail) Then
                                srcPrevStatus.Text = "전공정 완료"
                                srcPrevStatus.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                srcPrevStatus.ForeColor = Color.White
                            Else
                                srcPrevStatus.Text = ngDetail
                                srcPrevStatus.BackColor = Color.Red
                                srcPrevStatus.ForeColor = Color.White
                                NG()
                                PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "3") ' 전공정 미완료 NG
                                wStep = 100
                            End If
                        Else
                            srcPrevStatus.Text = "전공정 미사용"
                            srcPrevStatus.BackColor = Color.Gray
                            srcPrevStatus.ForeColor = Color.White
                        End If
                        If wStep <> 100 Then wStep = 2
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then '원본
            If PLC(4200) = 1 And PLC(4201) = 1 Then 'D4200, D4201
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING1 = "0000000000"

            If OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "4" ' NX5 & HEV
                Else
                    Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "3" ' NX4 & HEV
                End If
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "5" ' NX5 & ICE
            End If

            If OPTION2_REMOTE = 1 Then '4259
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 10, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 10, 1) = "0"
            End If
            '4253번지
            '차일드앙카 1개일때 1
            '차일드앙카 2개일때 2

            If OPTION_CHILD_ANCHOR = "1" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CHILD_ANCHOR = "2" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "0"
            End If

            ' CAR 타입 (NX4=1, NX5=2) - 인덱스 5 (6번째 문자)
            If OPTION_CAR = "NX4" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "0"
            End If

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", PLC_STRING1)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then 'LSUPT 시리얼 스캔

            If (srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                BarCode_Print_NX4(Create_End_Barcode)
                Save_DB(srcSerialNumber2.Text)
                RFID_TAG_ID1 = ""
                wStep = 7.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 7.1 Then

            wStep = 7.2

        ElseIf wStep = 7.2 Then

            ' 바로 다음 스텝으로 진행
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4251", "1")
            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then '원본
            If PLC(4251) = 1 Then 'D4251
                wStep = 9
            Else
                wStep = 7.2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then

            wStep = 10

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then '원본
            If PLC(4200) = 0 Then 'D4200
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4250", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
                Init_Control()
                wStep = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 100 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(36) = 2 Then '원본
            'If PLC(4236) = 2 Then 'D4236
            '    wStep2 = 0
            'Else
            '    wStep2 = 3
            'End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2

        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
        Dim dlg As New Form()
        Dim txt As New TextBox()
        Dim okBtn As New Button()
        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
        lbl.AutoSize = True
        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
        okBtn.Text = "확인"
        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
        Dim input As String = txt.Text

        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()
            frm.ShowDialog()
            LoadFProofFlags()
        Else
            MessageBox.Show("비밀번호가 틀렸습니다.", "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

    Function CheckPing(ByVal strAddress As String) As Boolean
        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp

    Private Sub ConnectTool1()
        Try

        End Try

    Private Sub RequestTool1Data(ByVal str As String)
        Try

            ServerStreamTool1.Write(outstring, 0, outstring.Length)

        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try

    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2

        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
        Dim dlg As New Form()
        Dim txt As New TextBox()
        Dim okBtn As New Button()
        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
        lbl.AutoSize = True
        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
        okBtn.Text = "확인"
        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
        Dim input As String = txt.Text

        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()
            frm.ShowDialog()
            LoadFProofFlags()
        Else
            MessageBox.Show("비밀번호가 틀렸습니다.", "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private ClientSocketTool1 As New System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient
    Private Tool1ConnectionStep As Single
    Private FlagTool1Connection As Single
    Private Tool1AliveCount As Double
    Private ServerStreamTool1 As NetworkStream

    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1()

        Dim buffsize As Integer
        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
        Dim temp1 As String = ""
        Dim ToolData As Double
        Dim ToolDecision As String

        Do
            Try
                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
                Next i
                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
                        ToolDecision = "OK"
                    Else
                        ToolDecision = "NG"
                    End If
                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))

                    If wStep = 6 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        End If

                    End If

                End If
                temp1 = ""
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        If CheckPing(ToolIP) = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
            tMRtool1.Interval = 100
            tMRtool1.Start()
        Else
            MsgBox("IP TOOL ERROR")
        End If

        Try
            If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID1.PortName = PortNumber_RFID1
            Serial_RFID1.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID1.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID1.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID1 Fail " & PortNumber_RFID1)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Printer.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Printer.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Printer.PortName = PortNumber_PRINTER
            Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Printer.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal targetname As String, ByVal strdata As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & targetname & " = '" & strdata & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 6 Then

            'If srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" And srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text <> "NA" Then
            '    strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN_RH SET " &
            '            "ST03_ECU_SN = '" & srcECU_BArcode.Text & "', " &
            '            "SAB_SERIAL = '" & srcSAB_BArcode.Text & "'," &
            '            "SAB_TQ1 = '" & srcSAB_TQ1.Text & "'," &
            '            "SAB_TQ2 = '" & srcSAB_TQ2.Text & "' " &
            '            "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"
            'Else
            '    strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN_RH SET " &
            '        "ST03_ECU_SN = '" & srcECU_BArcode.Text & "' " &
            '        "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snStr & "'"
            'End If

            ' ECU 바코드 판정
            If ScanData.Contains(srcECU_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_ECU_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST03_ECU_SN", ScanData) Then
                    srcECU_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcECU_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ' SAB 바코드 판정
            ElseIf ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_SAB_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) Then
                    srcECU_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            Else
                    NG()
            End If

        Else

            label_Message.Text = "Reset Need"

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN," & CStr(BarcodeSize) & ",200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & Trim(srcPartName2.Text) & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            srcPartNo2.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            srcPartName2.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)

            Dim tmp As String

            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName2.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)
            Next

            srcPartName2.Text = tmp

            OPTION2_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
            OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION2_COUNTRY = Rs.Fields("OPTION_COUNTRY").Value

            OPTION2_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION2_WS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_WS").Value)
            OPTION2_CTR_TETHER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CTR_TETHER").Value)
            OPTION2_HEATER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value)
            OPTION2_REMOTE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_REMOTE").Value)
            OPTION2_CLR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CLR").Value)

            ' CAR 컬럼 읽기 (NX4 또는 NX5)
            Try
                OPTION_CAR = Trim(Rs.Fields("CAR").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                OPTION_CAR = ""
            End Try

            OptionSAB = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value

            If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcSAB.ForeColor = Color.White
            Else
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.White
                srcSAB.ForeColor = Color.White
            End If
            
            If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" OrElse OPTION2_CAR_TYPE <> "DIVE" Then
                ' NX5는 모든 차종에서 SAB 수행, NX4는 DIVE 외에만 수행
                If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text = OptionSAB
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
            Else
                ' NX4 DIVE는 SAB 안함
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If

            If OPTION2_WS = 1 Then
                srcWS2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcWS2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_CTR_TETHER = 1 Then
                srcCTR_TETHER2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCTR_TETHER2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_HEATER = 1 Then
                srcHEATER2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcHEATER2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_REMOTE = 1 Then
                srcREMOTE2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcREMOTE2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_CLR = 1 Then
                srcCLR2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCLR2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            If OPTION2_LHRH = "LH" Then
                srcLH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_LHRH = "RH" Then
                srcRH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("DOMESTIC") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("NORTH AMERICA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION2_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
            '20200526004589410-N9060'
            srcECU_BArcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

            If FUNCTION_ECU_SERIAL = True Then
                If srcECU_BArcode_Target.Text = "0" Then
                    srcECU_BArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcECU_BArcode.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                Else
                    'srcECU_BArcode_Target.Text = ""
                    srcECU_BArcode.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                    srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                End If
            Else
                srcECU_BArcode.Text = "PASS"
                srcECU_BArcode.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                srcECU_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If

            wStep = 2
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function Create_End_Barcode() As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        Dim TMP As String = ""
        Dim _4M_1 As String
        Dim _4M_2 As String = ""
        Dim _4M_3 As String
        Dim _4M_4 As String
        Dim _4M_CODE As String

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL_TMP As String = ""
        Dim CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL_TMP As String = ""
        Dim SEAT_BELT_SERIAL_TMP As String = ""
        Dim HANESS_SERIAL_TMP As String = ""
        Dim ECU_SERIAL_TMP As String = ""

        Dim SplitTmp1() As String
        Dim SplitTmp2() As String
        Dim SplitTmp3() As String
        Dim SplitTmp4() As String
        Dim SplitTmp5() As String

        Dim InrBuckleTmp As String = ""
        Dim CtrBuckleTmp As String = ""
        Dim SeatBeltTmp As String = ""
        Dim HanessTmp As String = ""
        Dim EcuTmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Dim RRs As New ADODB.Recordset

        RRs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        RRs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        RRs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        RRs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_MAIN_RH WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If RRs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL_TMP = Trim(RRs.Fields("ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN").Value)
                CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL_TMP = Trim(RRs.Fields("ST01_CTR_BUCKLE_SN").Value)
                SEAT_BELT_SERIAL_TMP = Trim(RRs.Fields("ST02_BELT_SN").Value)
                'HANESS_SERIAL_TMP = Trim(RRs.Fields("ST02_HANESS_SN").Value)
                ECU_SERIAL_TMP = srcECU_BArcode.Text
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try

        End If

        RRs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        RRs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        _4M_1 = "1"
        If OPTION2_LHRH = "LH" Then
            _4M_2 = "L"
        ElseIf OPTION2_LHRH = "RH" Then
            _4M_2 = "R"
        End If

        If CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) >= 800 And CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) <= 1530 Then
            _4M_3 = "A"
        Else
            _4M_3 = "B"
        End If
        _4M_4 = "1"
        _4M_CODE = _4M_1 & _4M_2 & _4M_3 & _4M_4

        'If HANESS_SERIAL_TMP = "" Or HANESS_SERIAL_TMP = "NA" Then

        '    NX4_Barcode_Mode = 3

        SplitTmp1 = Split(INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL_TMP, Chr(29))

        For i = 1 To UBound(SplitTmp1) - 1
            If i < UBound(SplitTmp1) - 1 Then
                InrBuckleTmp = InrBuckleTmp & SplitTmp1(i) & GS
            Else
                InrBuckleTmp = InrBuckleTmp & SplitTmp1(i) & GS
            End If
        Next

        SplitTmp2 = Split(CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL_TMP, Chr(29))

        For i = 1 To UBound(SplitTmp2) - 1
            If i < UBound(SplitTmp2) - 1 Then
                CtrBuckleTmp = CtrBuckleTmp & SplitTmp2(i) & GS
            Else
                CtrBuckleTmp = CtrBuckleTmp & SplitTmp2(i) & GS
            End If
        Next

        SplitTmp3 = Split(SEAT_BELT_SERIAL_TMP, Chr(29))

        For i = 1 To UBound(SplitTmp3) - 1
            If i < UBound(SplitTmp3) - 1 Then
                SeatBeltTmp = SeatBeltTmp & SplitTmp3(i) & GS
            Else
                SeatBeltTmp = SeatBeltTmp & SplitTmp3(i) & GS
            End If
        Next

        If ECU_SERIAL_TMP.Length > 5 Then
            SplitTmp4 = Split(ECU_SERIAL_TMP, Chr(29))
            For i = 1 To UBound(SplitTmp4) - 1
                If i < UBound(SplitTmp4) - 1 Then
                    EcuTmp = EcuTmp & SplitTmp4(i) & GS
                Else
                    EcuTmp = EcuTmp & SplitTmp4(i) & GS
                End If
            Next
        Else
            EcuTmp = ""
        End If

        If EcuTmp = "" Then

            TMP =
            "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
            "V" & "PB30" & GS &
            "P" & Mid(srcPartNo2.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo2.Text, 7, 5) & PART_COLOR & GS &
            "S" & "" & GS &
            "E" & "" & GS &
            "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber2.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber2.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
            "M" & "" & GS &
            "C" & "" & GS &
            RS & EOT &
            "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & InrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
            "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & CtrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
            "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & SeatBeltTmp & RS & EOT

            BarcodeSize = 4

        Else

            TMP =
            "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
            "V" & "PB30" & GS &
            "P" & Mid(srcPartNo2.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo2.Text, 7, 5) & PART_COLOR & GS &
            "S" & "" & GS &
            "E" & "" & GS &
            "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber2.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber2.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
            "M" & "" & GS &
            "C" & "" & GS &
            RS & EOT &
            "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & InrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
            "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & CtrBuckleTmp & RS & EOT &
            "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & SeatBeltTmp & RS & EOT &
            "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & EcuTmp & RS & EOT

            BarcodeSize = 4

        End If

        label_Message.Text = TMP

        Return TMP

    End Function

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    ' DB에서 태그ID로 시리얼번호 조회
    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                serial = Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value & ""
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
        Return serial
    End Function

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean
        AppMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "NX4_REAR_RH_ST_ECU", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "RH_ST_ECU", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            Application.Exit()
            Return
        End If

        ' Updater Agent 시작 (미실행 시에만)
        Try
            If Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent").Length = 0 Then
                Dim agentPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "Updater_Agent.exe")
                If System.IO.File.Exists(agentPath) Then
                    Process.Start(agentPath)
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        EnsureIndexes()
        SerialOpen()

        ' PLC 통신 컨트롤 생성
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
        Me.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.140"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        Read_RFiD1()

        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID1.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID1.DiscardInBuffer()

                        '02 02 09 07 E0040 181D1 687B0 3 ' 8 + 16
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ1.Text = tagId
                                RFID_TAG_ID1 = tagId
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ1.Text = "Empty"
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ1.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sRecvData = ""
                Serial_RFID1.DiscardInBuffer()
            End Try
        Loop

    End Sub
