    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD1()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_RFiD1()

        If Serial_RFID1.IsOpen = True Then
            ' PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령 (8바이트)
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID1.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4500" & vbLf &
                                "D4501" & vbLf &
                                "D4502" & vbLf &
                                "D4503" & vbLf &
                                "D4504" & vbLf &
                                "D4505" & vbLf &
                                "D4506" & vbLf &
                                "D4507" & vbLf &
                                "D4508" & vbLf &
                                "D4509" & vbLf &
                                "D4510" & vbLf &
                                "D4511" & vbLf &
                                "D4550" & vbLf &
                                "D4551" & vbLf &
                                "D4552" & vbLf &
                                "D4553" & vbLf &
                                "D4554" & vbLf &
                                "D4555" & vbLf &
                                "D4556" & vbLf &
                                "D4557" & vbLf &
                                "D4558" & vbLf &
                                "D4559" & vbLf &
                                "D4560" & vbLf &
                                "D4561"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Public Sub BarCode_Print_NX4(ByVal strSerial As String)

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")

        'If NX4_Barcode_Mode = 1 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,6,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'ElseIf NX4_Barcode_Mode = 2 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,5,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'ElseIf NX4_Barcode_Mode = 3 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,4,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'ElseIf NX4_Barcode_Mode = 4 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,3,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'ElseIf NX4_Barcode_Mode = 5 Then

        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,2,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        'End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN," & CStr(BarcodeSize) & ",200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")
        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & " AM NX4" & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo2.Text & " PM NX4" & "^FS")
        End If
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & Trim(srcPartName2.Text) & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & srcSerialNumber2.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Part Color : " & PART_COLOR & "^FS")

        'If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        'End If

        'If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        'End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub
    Public Sub Force_BarCode_Print_NX4(ByVal strSerial As String, ByVal strPartNo As String, ByVal strPartName As String, ByVal strPartColor As String)

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")


        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,7,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & strPartNo & " AM NX4" & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & strPartNo & " PM NX4" & "^FS")
        End If
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & strPartName & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Part Color : " & strPartColor & "^FS")
        'If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        'End If

        'If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
        '    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        'End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub STick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step2.Text = wStep

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        FLAG_RFID1_RUN = True

        If wStep = 0 Then
            ' PLC 시작신호 대기 → 시작신호 시점의 RFID 데이터로 LoadPallet
            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                If RFID_TAG_ID1.Length = 16 Then
                    Dim serial As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID1)
                    If serial = "" OrElse Mid(serial, 1, 4) = "0000" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep = 100
                    Else
                        Init_Control()
                        srcSerialNumber2.Text = serial
                        Load_PArt(Mid(serial, 13))
                        wStep = 2
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
            'RFID_TAG_ID1 = ""
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING1 = "0000000000"

            If OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "4" ' NX5 & HEV
                Else
                    Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "3" ' NX4 & HEV
                End If
            ElseIf OPTION2_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 3, 1) = "5" ' NX5 & ICE
            End If

            If srcECU_BArcode.Text = "NA" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "0"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 4, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION2_REMOTE = 1 Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 10, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 10, 1) = "0"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING1, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 8, 1) = "0"
            End If

            ' CAR 타입 (NX4=1, NX5=2) - 인덱스 5 (6번째 문자)
            If OPTION_CAR = "NX4" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING1, 6, 1) = "0"
            End If

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", PLC_STRING1)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then ' ECU 시리얼 스캔

            If (srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcECU_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                'BarCode_Print_NX4(Create_End_Barcode)
                Save_DB(srcSerialNumber2.Text)
                RFID_TAG_ID1 = ""
                'PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", PLC_STRING1)
                wStep = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4551", "1")
            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
                wStep = 9
            Else
                wStep = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then

            wStep = 10

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ1.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 100 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(36) = 2 Then
            '    wStep2 = 0
            'Else
            '    wStep2 = 3
            'End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub tMRtool1_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles tMRtool1.Tick
        If Tool1ConnectionStep = 0 Then '
            ConnectTool1()
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 1 Then 'Connected
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0001" & "003" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 1.1
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 2 Then 'Connected
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0060" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 3
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 3 Then
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "9999" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 4 Then
            Tool1AliveCount = Tool1AliveCount + 0.1
            If Tool1AliveCount >= 4 Then
                RequestTool1Data("0020" & "9999" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
                Tool1AliveCount = 0
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

                    NG()
                End If
            End If
toolUseResult.newString:
' DIVE SAB 바코드 판정
            If wStep2 = 8 Then
                If srcSAB_BArcode_Target2.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target2.Text) Then
                    If srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "NA" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "PASS" Then
                        ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                    ElseIf FLAG_SAB_DUP And CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) = True Then
                        srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "중복"
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    Else
                        srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK"
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    End If
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "NG"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If
            End If

    Private Sub NG()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampNG()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DingDOng()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\DINGDONG.wav"

        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click
        Dim old As Long
        If Environment.Is64BitOperatingSystem Then
            If Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection(old) Then
                Process.Start(osk)
                Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(old)
            End If
        Else
            Process.Start(osk)
        End If

    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2

        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
        Dim dlg As New Form()
        Dim txt As New TextBox()
        Dim okBtn As New Button()
        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
        lbl.AutoSize = True
        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
        okBtn.Text = "확인"
        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
        Dim input As String = txt.Text

        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()
            frm.ShowDialog()
            LoadFProofFlags()
        Else
            MessageBox.Show("비밀번호가 틀렸습니다.", "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        ' Updater Agent 종료
        Try
            For Each p As Process In Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent")
                p.Kill()
            Next
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        End
    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID_DIVE.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID_DIVE.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.PortName = PortNumber_RFID_DIVE
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID_DIVE)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner_DIVE.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner_DIVE.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER_DIVE
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER_DIVE)
        End Try
        Try
            If SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.IsOpen() = True Then
                SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.Close()
            End If
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.PortName = PortNumber_RFID_OTHER
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.BaudRate = 9600
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.DataBits = 8
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID_OTHER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner_Other.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner_Other.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner_Other.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER_OTHER
            Serial_Scanner_Other.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner_Other.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner_Other.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER_OTHER)
        End Try

        If CheckPing(ToolIP_OTHER) = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
            tmrTool1.Interval = 100
            tmrTool1.Start()
        Else
            MsgBox("IP1 TOOL ERROR")
        End If

        If CheckPing(ToolIP_DIVE) = True Then
            Trd4 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool2)
            Trd4.IsBackground = True
            Trd4.Start()
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 0
            tmrTool2.Interval = 100
            tmrTool2.Start()
        Else
            MsgBox("IP2 TOOL ERROR")
        End If

        Try
            If Serial_Resist.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Resist.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_RESIST
            Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Resist.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Resist Fail " & PortNumber_RESIST)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    ' DIVE측 RFID PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령
    ' RFID 로그 기록
    Private Sub WriteRfidLog(rfidName As String, msg As String)
        Try
            Dim logDir As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "log")
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(logDir) Then System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(logDir)
            Dim logFile As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(logDir, "RFID_" & rfidName & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd") & ".log")
            System.IO.File.AppendAllText(logFile, DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss.fff") & " " & msg & vbCrLf)
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID_DIVE.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
            WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[TX] 02 02 00 03 07 03 E8 03")
        End If

    End Sub

    ' OTHER측 RFID PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령
    Private Sub Read_RFiD2()

        If SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
            WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[TX] 02 02 00 03 07 03 E8 03")
        End If

    End Sub

    ' DIVE측 RFID 수신 스레드 (PopV4 Dec2Hex 파싱)
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID_DIVE.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID_DIVE.DiscardInBuffer()
                        WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[RX] " & sRecvData & " (Len=" & sRecvData.Length & ")")
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                                RFID_TAG_ID1 = tagId
                                WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[TAG] " & tagId)
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                                WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[TAG] Empty (no E at pos 9)")
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sRecvData = ""
                Serial_RFID_DIVE.DiscardInBuffer()
                WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[ERR] " & ex.Message)
            End Try
        Loop

    End Sub

    ' OTHER측 RFID 수신 스레드 (PopV4 Dec2Hex 파싱)
    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                Dim Incoming1 As String = SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.DiscardInBuffer()
                        WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[RX] " & sRecvData & " (Len=" & sRecvData.Length & ")")
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ2.Text = tagId
                                RFID_TAG_ID2 = tagId
                                WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[TAG] " & tagId)
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ2.Text = "Empty"
                                WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[TAG] Empty (no E at pos 9)")
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ2.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sRecvData = ""
                SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.DiscardInBuffer()
                WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[ERR] " & ex.Message)
            End Try
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(ByVal TableName As String, ByVal targetname As String, ByVal strdata As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & targetname & " = '" & strdata & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Sub WritePlcValue(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal wValue As Short)

        ''WritePlc("D", "5053", "0")
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'


        szDeviceName = strChr & Format((Int(StartArry)), "0000") 'D 4000
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, wValue)
        Catch exception As Exception
            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub WritePlc(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    ' DB에서 팔레트ID로 시리얼번호 조회
    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                serial = Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value & ""
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
        Return serial
    End Function

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean
        AppMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "NX4_REAR_LH_ST02", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "LH_ST02", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            Application.Exit()
            Return
        End If

        ' Updater Agent 시작 (미실행 시에만)
        Try
            If Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent").Length = 0 Then
                Dim agentPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "Updater_Agent.exe")
                If System.IO.File.Exists(agentPath) Then
                    Process.Start(agentPath)
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        Init_Control()
        Init_Control2()
        Control2Arry()

        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        EnsureIndexes()
        Load_Basic()
        SerialOpen()

        ' PLC 통신 컨트롤 생성
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
        Me.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.160"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        Read_RFiD()
        Read_RFiD2()

        If Serial_RFID_DIVE.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
            WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[INFO] 스레드 시작 - 포트: " & Serial_RFID_DIVE.PortName & " 보드레이트: " & Serial_RFID_DIVE.BaudRate)
        Else
            WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[INFO] 시리얼 포트 미열림 - 스레드 시작 안함")
        End If

        If SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[INFO] 스레드 시작 - 포트: " & SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.PortName & " 보드레이트: " & SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.BaudRate)
        Else
            WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[INFO] 시리얼 포트 미열림 - 스레드 시작 안함")
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        Tmr_Work2.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work2.Start()


    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then
                Read_RFiD()
                Read_RFiD2()
            End If
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private PlcAdrValue(5000) As Integer

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim PLC_VALUE(0 To 100) As Integer
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 33

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4600" & vbLf &
                                "D4601" & vbLf &
                                "D4602" & vbLf &
                                "D4603" & vbLf &
                                "D4604" & vbLf &
                                "D4605" & vbLf &
                                "D4606" & vbLf &
                                "D4607" & vbLf &
                                "D4610" & vbLf &
                                "D4611" & vbLf &
                                "D4612" & vbLf &
                                "D4613" & vbLf &
                                "D4614" & vbLf &
                                "D4615" & vbLf &
                                "D4616" & vbLf &
                                "D4617" & vbLf &
                                "D4650" & vbLf &
                                "D4651" & vbLf &
                                "D4652" & vbLf &
                                "D4653" & vbLf &
                                "D4654" & vbLf &
                                "D4655" & vbLf &
                                "D4656" & vbLf &
                                "D4657" & vbLf &
                                "D4660" & vbLf &
                                "D4661" & vbLf &
                                "D4662" & vbLf &
                                "D4663" & vbLf &
                                "D4664" & vbLf &
                                "D4665" & vbLf &
                                "D4666" & vbLf &
                                "D4667" & vbLf &
                                "D4668"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 7
                PlcAdrValue(4600 + j) = PLC_VALUE(j)
            Next

            For j = 8 To 15
                PlcAdrValue(4610 - 8 + j) = PLC_VALUE(j)
            Next

            For j = 16 To 23
                PlcAdrValue(4650 - 16 + j) = PLC_VALUE(j)
            Next

            For j = 24 To 32
                PlcAdrValue(4660 - 24 + j) = PLC_VALUE(j)
            Next

            IN_LABEL(0).Text = "D4600"
            IN_LABEL(1).Text = "D4601"
            IN_LABEL(2).Text = "D4603"
            IN_LABEL(3).Text = "D4605"
            IN_LABEL(4).Text = "D4610"
            IN_LABEL(5).Text = "D4611"
            IN_LABEL(6).Text = "D4613"
            IN_LABEL(7).Text = "D4615"

            OUT_LABEL(0).Text = "D4650"
            OUT_LABEL(1).Text = "D4651"
            OUT_LABEL(2).Text = "D4652"
            OUT_LABEL(3).Text = "D4657"
            OUT_LABEL(4).Text = "D4660"
            OUT_LABEL(5).Text = "D4661"
            OUT_LABEL(6).Text = "D4662"
            OUT_LABEL(7).Text = "D4663"
            OUT_LABEL(8).Text = "D4667"
            OUT_LABEL(9).Text = "D4668"

            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PlcAdrValue(4600)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PlcAdrValue(4601)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(2).Text = PlcAdrValue(4603)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(3).Text = PlcAdrValue(4605)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(4).Text = PlcAdrValue(4610)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(5).Text = PlcAdrValue(4611)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(6).Text = PlcAdrValue(4613)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(7).Text = PlcAdrValue(4615)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PlcAdrValue(4650)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PlcAdrValue(4651)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PlcAdrValue(4652)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PlcAdrValue(4657)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PlcAdrValue(4660)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PlcAdrValue(4661)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(6).Text = PlcAdrValue(4662)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(7).Text = PlcAdrValue(4663)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(8).Text = PlcAdrValue(4667)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(9).Text = PlcAdrValue(4668)

            For j = 0 To 7
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 9
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"
        Else
            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
        End If

    End Sub

            srcPartName2.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Dim tmp As String
            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName2.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)
            Next
            srcPartName2.Text = tmp
            OPTIONSAB2 = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value

            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN2 = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

            Else

            Else

            Else

                srcCLR2.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else

            ' 차종 표시

                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.White

                srcDIVE2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE2.BackColor = Color.Black

                srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.Text = "NA"
                srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If

            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN2 = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN2 = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_HANESS_SN2 = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_ECU_SN2 = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

            If OPTION_LHRH2 = "LH" Then
                srcLH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH2 = "RH" Then
                srcRH2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH2.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_COUNTRY2.Contains("DOMESTIC") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY2.Contains("NORTH AMERICA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY2.Contains("AUSTRAILIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY2.Contains("RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY2.Contains("AUSTRAILIA RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA2.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA2.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            wStep2 = 3.2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub LampOK()

        Const C_index As Byte = 0
        Const C_type As Byte = 0

        Const D_not As Short = 100 ' Don't care  // Do not change before state
        Const C_lampoff As Byte = 0
        Const C_lampon As Byte = 1
        Const C_lampblink As Byte = 2

        Dim b_in As Boolean
        Dim b_vb As Boolean

        Dim bData(17) As Byte

        bData(0) = C_lampoff ' Red
        bData(1) = C_lampoff ' Yellow
        bData(2) = C_lampon ' Green
        'bData(3) = C_lampon ' Blue
        'bData(4) = C_lampblink ' White

        ' Sound      0-(off)   1-4(Sound select)
        ' Else ' Don't care   Do not change before state
        bData(5) = 0

        b_in = Usb_Qu_write(0, 0, bData(0))

        If b_in = 0 Then
            b_vb = False
        Else
            b_vb = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function GetPartNo(ByVal pID As String) As String

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmpPartno As String = ""

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Part where PLC_ID = '" & pID & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            tmpPartno = Rs.Fields("PART_NO").Value
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmpPartno

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DIVE_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner_DIVE.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim GetData As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner_DIVE.ReadLine()
        GetData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        ScanData = GetData
        Try
            ScandataDIVE.Text = ScanData
            ' DIVE SAB 바코드 판정
            If wStep2 = 8 Then
                If srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK" OrElse srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "NA" OrElse srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target2.Text) = True Then
                    If FLAG_SAB_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) = True Then
                        srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "중복"
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        NG()
                    Else
                        srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK"
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    End If
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "NG"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.DiscardInBuffer()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrTool1_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles tmrTool1.Tick 'OTHER
        Label22.Text = Tool1ConnectionStep
        If Tool1ConnectionStep = 0 Then '
            ConnectTool1()
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 1 Then 'Connected
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0001" & "003" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 1.1
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 2 Then 'Connected
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0060" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 3
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 3 Then
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "9999" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 4 Then
            Tool1AliveCount = Tool1AliveCount + 0.1
            If Tool1AliveCount >= 4 Then
                RequestTool1Data("0020" & "9999" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
                Tool1AliveCount = 0
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private ServerStreamTool1 As NetworkStream
    Private Sub ConnectTool1()
        Try
            ClientSocketTool1.Connect(ToolIP_OTHER, 4545)
            ServerStreamTool1 = ClientSocketTool1.GetStream
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 1
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub RequestTool1Data(ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Dim outstring As Byte() = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetBytes(str)
            ServerStreamTool1.Write(outstring, 0, outstring.Length)
            ServerStreamTool1.Flush()
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private ServerStreamTool2 As NetworkStream
    Private Sub ConnectTool2()
        Try
            ClientSocketTool2.Connect(ToolIP_DIVE, 4545)
            ServerStreamTool2 = ClientSocketTool2.GetStream
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 1
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub RequestTool2Data(ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Dim outstring As Byte() = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetBytes(str)
            ServerStreamTool2.Write(outstring, 0, outstring.Length)
            ServerStreamTool2.Flush()
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1() 'OTHER

        Dim buffsize As Integer
        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
        Dim temp1 As String = ""
        Dim ToolData As Double
        Dim ToolDecision As String

        tooldataOther.Text = "?"

        Do
            Try
                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
                Next i
                tooldataOther.Text = temp1
                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
                        ToolDecision = "OK"
                    Else
                        ToolDecision = "NG"
                    End If
                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
                    'tooldataOther.Text = ToolData

                    If wStep1 = 9 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        End If

                    End If

                End If
                temp1 = ""
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

                    tooldataDive.Text = ToolData

                    If wStep2 = 9 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK" Then
                        If srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ3.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ4.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        End If

                    End If

                End If
                temp1 = ""
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Left_Request_Resist()

        If Serial_Resist.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_Resist.Write(":MEAS:RES?" & ControlChars.CrLf)
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Right_Request_Resist()

        If Serial_Resist.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_Resist.Write(":MEAS:RES?" & ControlChars.CrLf)
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Serial_Resist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Resist.DataReceived
        Dim Incoming3 As String
        Dim tmp As String

        Incoming3 = Serial_Resist.ReadLine()
        Serial_Resist.DiscardInBuffer()

        tmp = Mid$(Incoming3, 1, Len(Incoming3) - 1)
        If wStep1 = 9 Then
            If Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "NA" Then
                If Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" Then

                    If Left_Resist_Send = True Then

                        If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                            'LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = "No Connection"
                        Else
                            If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                                Left_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
                                LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = Format(Left_Resist_Value + LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Left_Resist.Text
                            ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                                Left_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
                                LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = Format(Left_Resist_Value + LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Left_Resist.Text
                            End If

                            'If (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) >= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) <= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX) Then
                            Try
                                If (CDbl(LABEL_Left_Resist.Text) >= LEFT_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(LABEL_Left_Resist.Text) <= LEFT_RESIST_MAX) Then
                                    DingDOng()
                                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    WritePlc("D", "4668", "1")
                                    ResistStep = 1
                                End If
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try

                        End If
                        Left_Resist_Send = False
                    End If

                End If
            End If
            
        ElseIf wStep2 = 9 Then
            If Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "NA" Then
                If Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" Then

                    If Right_Resist_Send = True Then

                        If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                            'LABEL_Right_Resist.Text = "No Connection"
                        Else
                            If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                                Right_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
                                LABEL_Right_Resist.Text = Format(Right_Resist_Value + RIGHT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Right_Resist.Text
                            ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                                Right_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
                                LABEL_Right_Resist.Text = Format(Right_Resist_Value + RIGHT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Right_Resist.Text
                            End If

                            'If (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) >= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) <= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX) Then
                            Try
                                If (CDbl(LABEL_Right_Resist.Text) >= RIGHT_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(LABEL_Right_Resist.Text) <= RIGHT_RESIST_MAX) Then
                                    DingDOng()
                                    Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                    Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                End If
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try

                        End If
                        Right_Resist_Send = False
                    End If

                End If
            End If
            
            'ElseIf wStep1 = 10 Then
            '    If Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK" Or Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA" Then
            '        If Left_Resist_Send = True Then

Public Class FrmMain

    ' 중복 실행 방지용 Mutex

    Declare Function Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection Lib "kernel32" (ByRef oldvalue As Long) As Boolean

    Private Sub NG()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampNG()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DingDOng()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\DINGDONG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampOK()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click
        Dim old As Long
        If Environment.Is64BitOperatingSystem Then
            If Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection(old) Then
                Process.Start(osk)
                Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(old)
            End If
        Else
            Process.Start(osk)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button3_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click

        FrmPort.Show()
        'FormPassword.Show()
        'CheckFormPort = True

    End Sub

    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2

        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
        Dim dlg As New Form()
        Dim txt As New TextBox()
        Dim okBtn As New Button()
        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
        lbl.AutoSize = True
        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
        okBtn.Text = "확인"
        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
        Dim input As String = txt.Text

        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()
            frm.ShowDialog()
            LoadFProofFlags()
        Else
            MessageBox.Show("비밀번호가 틀렸습니다.", "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        ' Updater Agent 종료
        Try
            For Each p As Process In Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent")
                p.Kill()
            Next
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        End
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPicture(ByVal picTarget As PictureBox, ByVal picName As String)

        Try
            picTarget.Image = System.Drawing.Image.FromFile(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Image\" & picName & ".png")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        Try
            picTarget.Image = System.Drawing.Image.FromFile(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Image\" & picName & ".jpg")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        'LoadPicture(Picture_Main, "ASSEMBLE\NHGT")

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID_DIVE.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID_DIVE.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.PortName = PortNumber_RFID_DIVE
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID_DIVE)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner_DIVE.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner_DIVE.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER_DIVE
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER_DIVE)
        End Try
        Try
            If SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.IsOpen() = True Then
                SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.Close()
            End If
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.PortName = PortNumber_RFID_OTHER
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.BaudRate = 9600
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.DataBits = 8
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID_OTHER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner_Other.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner_Other.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner_Other.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER_OTHER
            Serial_Scanner_Other.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner_Other.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner_Other.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER_OTHER)
        End Try

        If CheckPing(ToolIP_OTHER) = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
            tmrTool1.Interval = 100
            tmrTool1.Start()
        Else
            MsgBox("IP1 TOOL ERROR")
        End If

        If CheckPing(ToolIP_DIVE) = True Then
            Trd4 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskAtlasTool2)
            Trd4.IsBackground = True
            Trd4.Start()
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 0
            tmrTool2.Interval = 100
            tmrTool2.Start()
        Else
            MsgBox("IP2 TOOL ERROR")
        End If

        Try
            If Serial_Resist.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Resist.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_RESIST
            Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Resist.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Resist Fail " & PortNumber_RESIST)
        End Try

    End Sub

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1

        Else

    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    ' DIVE측 RFID PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령
    ' RFID 로그 기록
    Private Sub WriteRfidLog(rfidName As String, msg As String)
        Try
            Dim logDir As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "log")
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(logDir) Then System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(logDir)
            Dim logFile As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(logDir, "RFID_" & rfidName & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd") & ".log")
            System.IO.File.AppendAllText(logFile, DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss.fff") & " " & msg & vbCrLf)
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID_DIVE.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID_DIVE.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
            WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[TX] 02 02 00 03 07 03 E8 03")
        End If

    End Sub

    ' OTHER측 RFID PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령
    Private Sub Read_RFiD2()

        If SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
            WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[TX] 02 02 00 03 07 03 E8 03")
        End If

    End Sub

    ' DIVE측 RFID 수신 스레드 (PopV4 Dec2Hex 파싱)
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID_DIVE.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID_DIVE.DiscardInBuffer()
                        WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[RX] " & sRecvData & " (Len=" & sRecvData.Length & ")")
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                                RFID_TAG_ID1 = tagId
                                WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[TAG] " & tagId)
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                                WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[TAG] Empty (no E at pos 9)")
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sRecvData = ""
                Serial_RFID_DIVE.DiscardInBuffer()
                WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[ERR] " & ex.Message)
            End Try
        Loop

    End Sub

    ' OTHER측 RFID 수신 스레드 (PopV4 Dec2Hex 파싱)
    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                Dim Incoming1 As String = SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.DiscardInBuffer()
                        WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[RX] " & sRecvData & " (Len=" & sRecvData.Length & ")")
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ2.Text = tagId
                                RFID_TAG_ID2 = tagId
                                WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[TAG] " & tagId)
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ2.Text = "Empty"
                                WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[TAG] Empty (no E at pos 9)")
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ2.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sRecvData = ""
                SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.DiscardInBuffer()
                WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[ERR] " & ex.Message)
            End Try
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code

        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'


        szDeviceName = strChr & Format((Int(StartArry)), "0000") 'D 4000
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, wValue)
        Catch exception As Exception

    Private Sub WritePlc(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                serial = Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value & ""
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing AndAlso Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex2 As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
        Return serial
