    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean
        AppMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "NX4_REAR_LH_ST02", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "LH_ST02", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            Application.Exit()
            Return
        End If

        ' Updater Agent 시작 (미실행 시에만)
        Try
            If Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent").Length = 0 Then
                Dim agentPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "Updater_Agent.exe")
                If System.IO.File.Exists(agentPath) Then
                    Process.Start(agentPath)
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        Init_Control()
        Init_Control2()
        Control2Arry()

        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        EnsureIndexes()
        Load_Basic()
        SerialOpen()

        ' PLC 통신 컨트롤 생성
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
        Me.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.160"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        Read_RFiD()
        Read_RFiD2()

        If Serial_RFID_DIVE.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
            WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[INFO] 스레드 시작 - 포트: " & Serial_RFID_DIVE.PortName & " 보드레이트: " & Serial_RFID_DIVE.BaudRate)
        Else
            WriteRfidLog("DIVE", "[INFO] 시리얼 포트 미열림 - 스레드 시작 안함")
        End If

        If SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[INFO] 스레드 시작 - 포트: " & SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.PortName & " 보드레이트: " & SERIAL_RFID_OTHER.BaudRate)
        Else
            WriteRfidLog("OTHER", "[INFO] 시리얼 포트 미열림 - 스레드 시작 안함")
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        Tmr_Work2.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work2.Start()


    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then
                Read_RFiD()
                Read_RFiD2()
            End If
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt2(ByVal str As String)

            StartTime2 = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo2.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            srcPartName2.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Dim tmp As String
            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName2.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName2.Text, i, 1)
            Next
            srcPartName2.Text = tmp
            OPTIONSAB2 = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value

    Private Sub Load_PArt1(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime1 = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Dim tmp As String
            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)
            Next
            srcPartName.Text = tmp
            OptionSAB = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value
            OPTION_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
            OPTION_CAR_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_COUNTRY = Rs.Fields("OPTION_COUNTRY").Value

            OPTION_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_WS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_WS").Value)
            OPTION_CTR_TETHER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CTR_TETHER").Value)
            OPTION_HEATER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value)
            OPTION_REMOTE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_REMOTE").Value)
            OPTION_CLR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CLR").Value)

            TARGET_SEAT_BELT_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("SEAT_BELT_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_HANESS_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_ECU_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

            ' CAR 컬럼 읽기 (NX4 또는 NX5)
            Try
                OPTION_CAR = Trim(Rs.Fields("CAR").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                OPTION_CAR = ""
            End Try

            If OPTION_WS = 1 Then
                srcWS.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcWS.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CTR_TETHER = 1 Then
                srcCTR_TETHER.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCTR_TETHER.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_HEATER = 1 Then
                srcHEATER.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcHEATER.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then
                srcREMOTE.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcREMOTE.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CLR = 1 Then
                srcCLR.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCLR.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                ' NX5는 모든 차종에서 SAB 수행
                If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text = OptionSAB
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                ' NX4 DIVE는 SAB 안함
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
            Else
                If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text = OptionSAB
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
            End If
            TARGET_SEAT_BELT_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("SEAT_BELT_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_HANESS_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_ECU_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

            If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("DOMESTIC") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("NORTH AMERICA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.Black
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            wStep1 = 3.2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub LampOK()

        Const C_index As Byte = 0
        Const C_type As Byte = 0

        Const D_not As Short = 100 ' Don't care  // Do not change before state
        Const C_lampoff As Byte = 0
        Const C_lampon As Byte = 1
        Const C_lampblink As Byte = 2

        Dim b_in As Boolean
        Dim b_vb As Boolean

        Dim bData(17) As Byte

        bData(0) = C_lampoff ' Red
        bData(1) = C_lampoff ' Yellow
        bData(2) = C_lampon ' Green
        'bData(3) = C_lampon ' Blue
        'bData(4) = C_lampblink ' White

        ' Sound      0-(off)   1-4(Sound select)
        ' Else ' Don't care   Do not change before state
        bData(5) = 0

        b_in = Usb_Qu_write(0, 0, bData(0))

        If b_in = 0 Then
            b_vb = False
        Else
            b_vb = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function GetPartNo(ByVal pID As String) As String

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmpPartno As String = ""

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Part where PLC_ID = '" & pID & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            tmpPartno = Rs.Fields("PART_NO").Value
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmpPartno

    End Function

    Private Plc_string2 As String

    Private Sub Tmr_Work2_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work2.Tick

        Label_Step2.Text = wStep2

        Try

            If PlcAdrValue(4600) = 0 And wStep2 <> 0 Then
                WritePlc("D", "4650", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep2 = 0
            End If

            If wStep2 = 0 Then

                If PlcAdrValue(4600) = 1 And PlcAdrValue(4601) = 1 Then
                    wStep2 = 2
                End If

            ElseIf wStep2 = 2 Then

                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                Init_Control2()
                wStep2 = 3

            ElseIf wStep2 = 3 Then '사양 스캔 대기

                srcPartNo2.Text = GetPartNo(CStr(PlcAdrValue(4603))) 'ID
                'srcSerialNumber2.Text = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(PlcAdrValue(4605), "0000") & srcPartNo2.Text
                srcSerialNumber2.Text = Format(PlcAdrValue(4604), "0000") & Format(PlcAdrValue(4606), "0000") & Format(PlcAdrValue(4605), "0000") & srcPartNo2.Text
                wStep2 = 3.1

            ElseIf wStep2 = 3.1 Then '사양 스캔 완료
                Load_PArt2(srcPartNo2.Text)
            ElseIf wStep2 = 3.2 Then '
                wStep2 = 3.3
            ElseIf wStep2 = 3.3 Then '
                wStep2 = 4
            ElseIf wStep2 = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

                Plc_string2 = "0000000000"
                If OPTION_CAR_TYPE2 = "DIVE" Then
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 3, 1) = "1"
                ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE2 = "FOLD" Then
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 3, 1) = "2"
                ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE2 = "HEV" Then
                    If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                        Mid(Plc_string2, 3, 1) = "4" ' NX5 & HEV
                    Else
                        Mid(Plc_string2, 3, 1) = "3" ' NX4 & HEV
                    End If
                ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE2 = "ICE" Then
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 3, 1) = "5" ' NX5 & ICE
                End If
                If OPTION_REMOTE2 = 1 Then '4359
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 10, 1) = "1"
                Else
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 10, 1) = "0"
                End If

                Mid(Plc_string2, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
                If OPTIONSAB2 <> "0" Then
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 8, 1) = "1"
                Else
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 8, 1) = "0"
                End If

                ' CAR 타입 (NX4=1, NX5=2) - 인덱스 5 (6번째 문자)
                If OPTION_CAR = "NX4" Then
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 6, 1) = "1"
                ElseIf OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 6, 1) = "2"
                Else
                    Mid(Plc_string2, 6, 1) = "0"
                End If

                WritePlc("D", "4650", Plc_string2)
                wStep2 = 4.1

            ElseIf wStep2 = 4.1 Then
                If PlcAdrValue(4650) = 1 Then
                    wStep2 = 5
                Else
                    wStep2 = 4
                End If
            ElseIf wStep2 = 5 Then

                wStep2 = 6

            ElseIf wStep2 = 6 Then

                'srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
                wStep2 = 7

            ElseIf wStep2 = 7 Then

                wStep2 = 8

            ElseIf wStep2 = 8 Then
                If (srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "NA" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "PASS") Then
                    wStep2 = 9
                End If
            ElseIf wStep2 = 9 Then ' 버클 스캔 및 토크 작업
                If Right_Resist_Send = False And Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" And Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "NA" Then 'SAB Resist
                    Right_Request_Resist()
                    Right_Resist_Send = True
                End If
                If ResistUse = False Then
                    Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA"
                    Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
                If OPTIONSAB2 = "0" Then
                    Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA"
                    Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
                If (srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.Text = "OK" Or srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.Text = "NA" Or srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.Text = "PASS") And
                    (Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK" Or Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA") Then
                    srcTotal_Decision2.Text = "OK"
                    srcTotal_Decision2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    wStep2 = 10
                End If
            ElseIf wStep2 = 10 Then
                'If Right_Resist_Send = False Then
                '    Right_Request_Resist()
                '    Right_Resist_Send = True
                '    lblRightResistError.Visible = True
                'End If
                'If lblResist.Text = "No Connection" Then
                '    lblRightResistError.Visible = False
                '    wStep2 = 11
                'End If
                wStep2 = 11
            ElseIf wStep2 = 11 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4651", "1")
                wStep2 = 12

            ElseIf wStep2 = 12 Then

                wStep2 = 13

            ElseIf wStep2 = 13 Then

                If PlcAdrValue(4601) = 1 Then
                    wStep2 = 13.1
                End If

            ElseIf wStep2 = 13.1 Then

                'Write_RFID(srcSerialNumber.Text)
                'Tmr_Count = 0
                wStep2 = 13.2

            ElseIf wStep2 = 13.2 Then

                'Tmr_Count = Tmr_Count + 0.1
                'If Tmr_Count >= 0.5 Then

                '    If Label_RF_READ.Text = srcSerialNumber.Text Then
                '        LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
                '        LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Blue
                '        wStep = 13.3
                '    Else
                '        wStep = 13.1
                '    End If
                'End If
                wStep2 = 13.3

            ElseIf wStep2 = 13.3 Then

                wStep2 = 13.4

            ElseIf wStep2 = 13.4 Then

                wStep2 = 14

            ElseIf wStep2 = 14 Then

                Save_DB2()
                RFID_TAG_ID1 = ""
                wStep2 = 15

            ElseIf wStep2 = 15 Then

                If PlcAdrValue(4600) = 0 Then
                    WritePlc("D", "4650", "0000000000")
                    Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                    wStep2 = 0
                End If
            ElseIf wStep2 = 100 Then
                ' PASS 상태 - PLC 리셋 대기
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

                PLC_STRING = "0000000000"
                If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
                ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
                ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then

                        Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "4" ' NX5 & HEV
                    Else
                        Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3" ' NX4 & HEV
                    End If
                ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "5" ' NX5 & ICE

                If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then '4359
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "1"
                Else
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "0"

                Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
                If OptionSAB <> "0" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"

                ' CAR 타입 (NX4=1, NX5=2) - 인덱스 5 (6번째 문자)
                If OPTION_CAR = "NX4" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
                ElseIf OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
                Else
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "0"
                End If

                WritePlc("D", "4660", PLC_STRING)
                wStep1 = 4.1

            ElseIf wStep1 = 4.1 Then
                If PlcAdrValue(4660) = 1 Then
                    wStep1 = 5
                Else
                    wStep1 = 4
                End If
            ElseIf wStep1 = 5 Then

                wStep1 = 6

            ElseIf wStep1 = 6 Then

                'srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
                wStep1 = 7

            ElseIf wStep1 = 7 Then

                wStep1 = 8

            ElseIf wStep1 = 8 Then
                If (srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
                    wStep1 = 9
                End If

            ElseIf wStep1 = 9 Then ' 버클 스캔 및 토크 작업
                If Left_Resist_Send = False And Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" And Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "NA" Then 'SAB Resist
                    Left_Request_Resist()
                    Left_Resist_Send = True
                End If
                If ResistUse = False Then
                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA"
                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
                If OptionSAB = "0" Then
                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA"
                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                End If
                If (srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                    (Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK" Or Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA") Then
                    srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                    srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    wStep1 = 10
                End If
            ElseIf wStep1 = 10 Then
                wStep1 = 11
            ElseIf wStep1 = 11 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4661", "1")
                wStep1 = 12

            ElseIf wStep1 = 12 Then

                wStep1 = 13

            ElseIf wStep1 = 13 Then

                If PlcAdrValue(4611) = 1 Then
                    wStep1 = 13.1
                End If

            ElseIf wStep1 = 13.1 Then

                'Write_RFID(srcSerialNumber.Text)
                'Tmr_Count = 0
                wStep1 = 13.2

            ElseIf wStep1 = 13.2 Then

                wStep1 = 13.3

            ElseIf wStep1 = 13.3 Then

                wStep1 = 13.4

            ElseIf wStep1 = 13.4 Then

                wStep1 = 14

            ElseIf wStep1 = 14 Then

                Save_DB1()
                RFID_TAG_ID2 = ""
                wStep1 = 15

            ElseIf wStep1 = 15 Then

                If PlcAdrValue(4610) = 0 Then
                    WritePlc("D", "4660", "0000000000")
                    Label_RF_READ2.Text = ""
                    wStep1 = 0
                End If
            ElseIf wStep1 = 100 Then
                ' PASS 상태 - PLC 리셋 대기
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DIVE_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner_DIVE.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim GetData As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner_DIVE.ReadLine()
        GetData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        ScanData = GetData
        Try
            ScandataDIVE.Text = ScanData
            ' DIVE SAB 바코드 판정
            If wStep2 = 8 Then
                If srcSAB_BArcode_Target2.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target2.Text) Then
                    If srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "NA" Or srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "PASS" Then
                        ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                    ElseIf FLAG_SAB_DUP And CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) = True Then
                        srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "중복"
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    Else
                        srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK"
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    End If
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "NG"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            Serial_Scanner_DIVE.DiscardInBuffer()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_Other_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner_Other.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim GetData As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner_Other.ReadLine()
        GetData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        ScanData = GetData
        Try
            ScandataOTHER.Text = ScanData
            ' OTHER SAB 바코드 판정
            If wStep1 = 8 Then
                If srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" OrElse srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" OrElse srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text) = True Then
                    If FLAG_SAB_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) = True Then
                        srcSAB_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    Else
                        srcSAB_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                        srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    End If
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            Serial_Scanner_Other.DiscardInBuffer()
        End Try
        
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrTool1_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles tmrTool1.Tick 'OTHER
        Label22.Text = Tool1ConnectionStep
        If Tool1ConnectionStep = 0 Then '
            ConnectTool1()
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 1 Then 'Connected
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0001" & "003" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 1.1
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 2 Then 'Connected
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0060" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 3
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 3 Then
            RequestTool1Data("0020" & "9999" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 4 Then
            Tool1AliveCount = Tool1AliveCount + 0.1
            If Tool1AliveCount >= 4 Then
                RequestTool1Data("0020" & "9999" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
                Tool1AliveCount = 0
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrTool2_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles tmrTool2.Tick 'DIVE
        Label23.Text = Tool2ConnectionStep
        If Tool2ConnectionStep = 0 Then '
            ConnectTool2()
        ElseIf Tool2ConnectionStep = 1 Then 'Connected
            RequestTool2Data("0020" & "0001" & "003" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 1.1
        ElseIf Tool2ConnectionStep = 2 Then 'Connected
            RequestTool2Data("0020" & "0060" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 3
        ElseIf Tool2ConnectionStep = 3 Then
            RequestTool2Data("0020" & "9999" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf Tool2ConnectionStep = 4 Then
            Tool2AliveCount = Tool2AliveCount + 0.1
            If Tool2AliveCount >= 4 Then
                RequestTool2Data("0020" & "9999" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
                Tool2AliveCount = 0
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private ServerStreamTool1 As NetworkStream
    Private Sub ConnectTool1()
        Try
            ClientSocketTool1.Connect(ToolIP_OTHER, 4545)
            ServerStreamTool1 = ClientSocketTool1.GetStream
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 1
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub RequestTool1Data(ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Dim outstring As Byte() = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetBytes(str)
            ServerStreamTool1.Write(outstring, 0, outstring.Length)
            ServerStreamTool1.Flush()
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool1ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private ServerStreamTool2 As NetworkStream
    Private Sub ConnectTool2()
        Try
            ClientSocketTool2.Connect(ToolIP_DIVE, 4545)
            ServerStreamTool2 = ClientSocketTool2.GetStream
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 1
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub RequestTool2Data(ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Dim outstring As Byte() = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetBytes(str)
            ServerStreamTool2.Write(outstring, 0, outstring.Length)
            ServerStreamTool2.Flush()
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tool2ConnectionStep = 0
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1() 'OTHER

        Dim buffsize As Integer
        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
        Dim temp1 As String = ""
        Dim ToolData As Double
        Dim ToolDecision As String

        tooldataOther.Text = "?"

        Do
            Try
                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
                Next i
                tooldataOther.Text = temp1
                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
                        ToolDecision = "OK"
                    Else
                        ToolDecision = "NG"
                    End If
                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
                    'tooldataOther.Text = ToolData

                    If wStep1 = 9 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        End If

                    End If

                End If
                temp1 = ""
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool2() 'DIVE

        Dim buffsize As Integer
        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte

        tooldataDive.Text = "?"

                tooldataDive.Text = temp1
                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then

                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then

                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
                        ToolDecision = "OK"

                    RequestTool2Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
                    tooldataDive.Text = ToolData

                    If wStep2 = 9 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK" Then
                        If srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ3.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
                            srcSAB_TQ4.Text = CStr(ToolData)
                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
                                srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.Text = "OK"
                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                DingDOng()
                            Else
                                srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text = "NG"
                                srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                NG()
                            End If
                        End If

                    End If

                End If
                temp1 = ""
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Resist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Resist.DataReceived
        Dim Incoming3 As String
        Dim tmp As String

        Incoming3 = Serial_Resist.ReadLine()
        Serial_Resist.DiscardInBuffer()

        tmp = Mid$(Incoming3, 1, Len(Incoming3) - 1)
        If wStep1 = 9 Then
            If Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "NA" Then
                If Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" Then

                    If Left_Resist_Send = True Then

                        If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                            'LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = "No Connection"
                        Else
                            If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                                Left_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
                                LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = Format(Left_Resist_Value + LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Left_Resist.Text
                            ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                                Left_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
                                LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = Format(Left_Resist_Value + LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Left_Resist.Text
                            End If

                            'If (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) >= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) <= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX) Then
                            Try
                                If (CDbl(LABEL_Left_Resist.Text) >= LEFT_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(LABEL_Left_Resist.Text) <= LEFT_RESIST_MAX) Then
                                    DingDOng()
                                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    WritePlc("D", "4668", "1")
                                    ResistStep = 1
                                End If
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try

                        End If
                        Left_Resist_Send = False
                    End If

                End If
            End If
            
        ElseIf wStep2 = 9 Then
            If Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "NA" Then
                If Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" Then

                    If Right_Resist_Send = True Then

                        If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                            'LABEL_Right_Resist.Text = "No Connection"

                                Right_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
                                LABEL_Right_Resist.Text = Format(Right_Resist_Value + RIGHT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Right_Resist.Text
                            ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                                Right_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
                                LABEL_Right_Resist.Text = Format(Right_Resist_Value + RIGHT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Right_Resist.Text
                            End If

                            'If (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) >= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) <= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX) Then
                            Try
                                If (CDbl(LABEL_Right_Resist.Text) >= RIGHT_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(LABEL_Right_Resist.Text) <= RIGHT_RESIST_MAX) Then
                                    DingDOng()
                                    Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                    Label_Right_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                End If
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try

                        End If
                        Right_Resist_Send = False
                    End If

                End If
            End If
            
            'ElseIf wStep1 = 10 Then

    Private Sub NG()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampNG()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DingDOng()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\DINGDONG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampOK()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click
        Dim old As Long
        If Environment.Is64BitOperatingSystem Then
            If Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection(old) Then
                Process.Start(osk)
                Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(old)
            End If
        Else
            Process.Start(osk)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button3_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click

        FrmPort.Show()
        'FormPassword.Show()
        'CheckFormPort = True

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        ' Updater Agent 종료
        Try
            For Each p As Process In Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent")
                p.Kill()
            Next
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        End
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPicture(ByVal picTarget As PictureBox, ByVal picName As String)

        Try
            picTarget.Image = System.Drawing.Image.FromFile(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Image\" & picName & ".png")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        Try
            picTarget.Image = System.Drawing.Image.FromFile(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Image\" & picName & ".jpg")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        'LoadPicture(Picture_Main, "ASSEMBLE\NHGT")

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool1.Open()
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool1.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool1.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool1 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
        End Try


    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal targetname As String, ByVal strdata As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & targetname & " = '" & strdata & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String
        Dim s As String
        Dim Tmp As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        s = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 1, 23)

        If wStep = 9 Then

            ' INR BUCKLE 바코드 판정
            If srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_INR_BUCKLE_DUP And CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

                ' HANESS 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_HANESS_DUP And CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_HANESS_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

                ' 프레임 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                Else
                    srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            Else
                NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) >= 10 Then
                Init_Control()
                Load_PArt(Label_Scanner.Text)
                '3.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

            If Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("NNB") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.White
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "NNB"
                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
                wStep = 3.3
            ElseIf Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("WDN") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.White
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.Black
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "WDN"
                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
                wStep = 3.3
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            ' PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령 (8바이트)
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()

                        '02 02 09 07 E0040 181D1 687B0 3 ' 8 + 16
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                                ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                                RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                sRecvData = ""

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))
                            label_Message.Text = ToolData.ToString()

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                ' 이미 판정 완료된 경우 무시
                                If srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "OK" AndAlso srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "NA" AndAlso srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "PASS" Then
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ToolData

                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private TMPLOT As Integer
    Private TMPYEAR As Integer
    Private TMPMONTHDATE As Integer

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 5001, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text
        TMPLOT = Rs.RecordCount + 5001
        TMPYEAR = CInt(Format(Now, "yyyy"))
        TMPMONTHDATE = CInt(Format(Now, "MMdd"))
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Now()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            WORK_PARTNO = Trim(Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then '원본
        If PLC(4300) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then 'D4300
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Else
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then '원본
            If PLC(4300) = 1 And PLC(4301) = 1 Then 'D4300, D4301
                If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                    DeletePallet(RFID_TAG_ID) ' 기존 매핑 삭제
                End If
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then '사양 스캔 대기

            'WORK_PARTNO7' = ""
            'Check_Now()
            'wStep = 3.1

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then '사양 스캔 완료
            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then '칼라 스캔 대기

            'If Len(WORK_PARTNO) = 23 Then
            '    'srcPartNo.Text = WORK_PARTNO
            '    Load_PArt(WORK_PARTNO)
            'End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.3 Then '칼라스캔 완료

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "4" ' NX5 & HEV
                Else
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3" ' NX4 & HEV
                End If
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "5" ' NX5 & ICE
            End If
            If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then '4359
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "0"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상

            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "0"
            End If

            ' CAR 타입 (NX4=1, NX5=2) - 인덱스 5 (6번째 문자)
            If OPTION_CAR = "NX4" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "0"
            End If

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", PLC_STRING)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
            WritePlcValue("D", "4353", CShort(PartID(srcPartNo.Text)))
            WritePlcValue("D", "4354", CShort(TMPYEAR))
            WritePlcValue("D", "4355", CShort(TMPLOT))
            WritePlcValue("D", "4356", CShort(TMPMONTHDATE))
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' 버클 스캔 및 토크 작업

            If (srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 11
            End If
            'ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            '    If (srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
            '        srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            '        srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            '        srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
            '        wStep = 11
            '    End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4351", "1")
            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then '원본
            'If PLC(4351) = 1 Then 'D4351
            '    wStep = 13
            'Else
            '    wStep = 11
            'End If
            wStep = 13

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then '원본
            If PLC(4302) = 1 Then 'D4302
                wStep = 13.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then

            ' DB에 태그ID-시리얼 매핑 저장 (RFID 데이터 있을 때만)
            If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If
            Tmr_Count = 0
            wStep = 13.2

        ElseIf wStep = 13.2 Then

            Tmr_Count = Tmr_Count + 0.1
            If Tmr_Count >= 0.3 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4358", "1")
                wStep = 14
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            Save_DB()
            RFID_TAG_ID = ""
            AddGrid(srcPartNo.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR)
            InitGrid()
            LoadGrid()
            'Save_Count()
            'Init_Grid()
            'Load_Grid()
            wStep = 15

        ElseIf wStep = 15 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(2) = 0 Then '원본
            If PLC(4302) = 0 Then 'D4302
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    ' Table_pallet 자동 생성
    Private Sub EnsureTablePallet()
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Sql_Connect.Execute(
                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Table_pallet') " &
                "CREATE TABLE Table_pallet ( " &
                "ID numeric(18,0) IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY, " &
                "PalletID nvarchar(50), " &
                "SerialNumber nvarchar(50) )")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' DB에서 태그ID 매핑 삭제
    Private Sub DeletePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' DB에 태그ID-시리얼 매핑 저장
    Private Sub SavePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String, ByVal strSerial As String)
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("PalletID").Value = strPalletID
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function PartID(ByVal strPArtno As String) As String

        Connection_Open()
        Dim pID As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & strPArtno & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            pID = Rs.Fields("PLC_ID").Value
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return pID

    End Function

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean
        AppMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "NX4_REAR_LH_ST01", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "LH_ST01", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            Application.Exit()
            Return
        End If

        ' Updater Agent 시작 (미실행 시에만)
        Try
            If Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent").Length = 0 Then
                Dim agentPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "Updater_Agent.exe")
                If System.IO.File.Exists(agentPath) Then
                    Process.Start(agentPath)
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        ' PLC 통신 컨트롤 생성
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
        Me.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()

        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        EnsureIndexes()
        SerialOpen()
        EnsureTablePallet()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.160"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4300" & vbLf &
                                "D4301" & vbLf &
                                "D4302" & vbLf &
                                "D4303" & vbLf &
                                "D4304" & vbLf &
                                "D4305" & vbLf &
                                "D4306" & vbLf &
                                "D4307" & vbLf &
                                "D4308" & vbLf &
                                "D4309" & vbLf &
                                "D4310" & vbLf &
                                "D4311" & vbLf &
                                "D4350" & vbLf &
                                "D4351" & vbLf &
                                "D4352" & vbLf &
                                "D4353" & vbLf &
                                "D4354" & vbLf &
                                "D4355" & vbLf &
                                "D4356" & vbLf &
                                "D4357" & vbLf &
                                "D4358" & vbLf &
                                "D4359" & vbLf &
                                "D4360" & vbLf &
                                "D4361"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private OptionSAb As String

    Sub WritePlcValue(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal wValue As Short)

        ''WritePlc("D", "5053", "0")
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'


        szDeviceName = strChr & Format((Int(StartArry)), "0000") 'D 4000
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, wValue)
        Catch exception As Exception
            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            srcPartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value

            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Dim tmp As String

            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)
            Next

            srcPartName.Text = tmp

            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

            OptionSAb = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value

            OPTION_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
            OPTION_CAR_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_COUNTRY = Rs.Fields("OPTION_COUNTRY").Value

            OPTION_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_WS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_WS").Value)
            OPTION_CTR_TETHER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CTR_TETHER").Value)
            OPTION_HEATER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value)
            OPTION_REMOTE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_REMOTE").Value)
            OPTION_CLR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CLR").Value)

            TARGET_SEAT_BELT_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("SEAT_BELT_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_HANESS_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_ECU_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

            ' CAR 컬럼 읽기 (NX4 또는 NX5)
            Try
                OPTION_CAR = Trim(Rs.Fields("CAR").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                OPTION_CAR = ""
            End Try

            ' TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE 컬럼 읽기
            Try
                TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = Trim(Rs.Fields("TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE").Value)
                If IsDBNull(Rs.Fields("TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE").Value) Then
                    TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = ""
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = ""
            End Try

            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
            If OPTION_WS = 1 Then
                srcWS.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcWS.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CTR_TETHER = 1 Then

            Else
