        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2

        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
        Dim dlg As New Form()
        Dim txt As New TextBox()
        Dim okBtn As New Button()
        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
        lbl.AutoSize = True
        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)

        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With GridCount

            .SuspendLayout()
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            ' 컬럼 추가
            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "품번")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "생산수량")

            ' 컬럼 설정
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 240
            .Columns(2).Width = 150

            For i As Integer = 0 To 2
                .Columns(i).DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                .Columns(i).DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 24.0!, FontStyle.Bold)
                .Columns(i).SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

            ' 헤더 스타일
            .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
            .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 24.0!, FontStyle.Bold)
            .ColumnHeadersHeight = 45

            .ResumeLayout()

        End With

    End Sub


    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT JObPartNo,JobCount FROM Table_Count ORDER BY LEN(JobPartNo),JobPartNo", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            Rs.MoveFirst()

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF

                    GridCount.Rows.Add("", Rs.Fields("JobPartNo").Value, Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End If

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ResetGrid()

        Dim strSQL As String

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        strSQL = "DELETE * FROM TABLE_COUNT"
        Mdb_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub AddGrid(strPart As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpInt As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Count WHERE JobPartNo = '" & strPart & "'", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

            Rs.AddNew()

            Rs.Fields("JobPartno").Value = strPart
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = "1"
            Rs.Update()

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            TmpInt = CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
            TmpInt = TmpInt + 1
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = CStr(TmpInt)
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    

End Class

The user said: "if 큰 분기에서 contains 으로 분기되고 그 아래에서 na pass 검사해라" - this means the Contains should branch into the right item, and THEN check NA/PASS inside.

But the problem is that Contains is not specific enough - multiple targets can match the same barcode.

I think the correct fix is: if an item is already completed (OK/NA/PASS), skip that branch entirely so it falls through to the next ElseIf. This way, if INR_BUCKLE is already OK and the frame barcode happens to contain the INR_BUCKLE target, it won't get caught there - it will fall through to the FRAME check.

The structure should check whether each item has already been judged before attempting to match its barcode pattern. So I'd add a condition that verifies the decision text isn't already set to OK, NA, or PASS before processing that branch. This prevents already-completed items from intercepting barcodes that should match later conditions.

The user wants to simplify the wStep=9 branch. Instead of having multiple ElseIf branches for different barcode types, they want a single big branch structure that's easier to read.

Let me think about what they want:
1. Contains to determine which item the scan is for - this should be the outer branching
2. Then NA/PASS check inside

But they also want it simpler. Maybe they want the approach to be: just check each item independently? Like:

```vb
If wStep = 9 Then
    Dim matched As Boolean = False
    
    ' INR BUCKLE


```

I'm setting up a matched flag and then checking each barcode type sequentially - first checking if the target barcode exists and the scan contains it, then validating that the decision field isn't already set to OK, NA, or PASS before processing.

Then I move through the HARNESS check, FRAME check, and if nothing matched by the end, I call the NG function to mark it as no good. The user's feedback suggests consolidating these nested conditions - instead of checking "not matched" repeatedly in each branch, I could move that check into the outer IF so each section only evaluates if we haven't already found a match, making the logic cleaner and easier to follow. I'm noticing this validation logic is getting unwieldy with all these nested conditions checking barcode targets, scan data matches, and status values across multiple components like HANESS and FRAME. Each branch follows the same pattern of validating whether a barcode exists and hasn't already been marked as OK, NA, or PASS, then handling duplicates or returning an error if nothing matches.

The user is right that consolidating this into a single outer condition with a helper function to check each barcode type would make it much more readable and maintainable. I see the user's constraint about not introducing new patterns, so I need to work within the existing structure. Let me refactor this by simplifying the nested conditions and keeping the barcode processing logic inline without creating separate helper functions. Writing validation logic...

I see the pattern now—checking if the Dec field is empty is the cleanest way to determine if a barcode has already been validated, since it gets populated with status values like "OK", "NA", or "중복" once processed. This approach is simpler than tracking separate flags. I'm realizing there's a potential behavior change here—if someone gets an NG result and wants to rescan without a full reset, my proposed check would skip processing since Dec wouldn't be empty. But in this factory workflow, NG typically triggers a complete reset anyway, so the current approach should work fine.

The user's asking for simpler branching: check the item type first with a contains condition, then verify the judgment status isn't already complete, and only then check for duplicates or OK results. This consolidates the logic into cleaner outer and inner conditions.

I'm weighing whether to check `Dec = ""` as "not yet judged" versus checking for multiple non-completion states—the former is simpler but might allow re-scanning after NG, though that might be acceptable if NG triggers a reset cycle anyway.

Looking at the actual flow, NG doesn't necessarily reset the step, so operators could re-scan after an NG result. I should stick with the multi-condition check to allow that, and put the complete condition in the outer If statement to fix the frame barcode issue.

Writing the conditional logic... I'm restructuring the condition to check whether the barcode decision is incomplete at the outer level, so the ElseIf chain can properly evaluate different barcode types without getting stuck in the first branch. Writing validation logic...

﻿Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Net
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Media
Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms
Imports System.Reflection
Imports System.IO.Ports

Public Class FrmMain

    ' 중복 실행 방지용 Mutex
    Private Shared AppMutex As System.Threading.Mutex

    Declare Function Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection Lib "kernel32" (ByRef oldvalue As Long) As Boolean
    Declare Function Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection Lib "kernel32" (ByRef oldvalue As Long) As Boolean
    Private osk As String = "C:\Windows\System32\osk.exe"

    Private OPTION_CAR As String  ' NX4 또는 NX5 차종 구분
    Private Tmr_LampCount As Double

    Private serialNumber As String
    Private serialNumberPart As String

    Private PRODUCT_COLOR As String
    Private RF_READ_DELAY As Double
    Private RF_READ_COUNT As Double

    Private FLAG_RFID_RUN As Boolean
    Private RFID_TAG_ID As String = ""

    Private Tmr_Count As Double
    Private PLC_STRING As String
    Private WORK_PARTNO As String
    Private Tool_Delay_count As Double
    Private Tool_Ready As Boolean
    Private Tool_String As String
    Private Tool_Connection As Boolean
    Private Tool2_Delay_count As Double
    Private Tool2_Ready As Boolean
    Private Tool2_String As String
    Private Tool2_Connection As Boolean

    Private tError1 As String
    Private tStep1 As String

    Private FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 As Boolean
    Private ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 As String

    Private OPTION_LHRH As String
    Private OPTION_CAR_TYPE As String
    Private OPTION_COUNTRY As String
    Private OPTION_TYPE As String
    Private OPTION_WS As Integer
    Private OPTION_CLR As Integer
    Private OPTION_CTR_TETHER As Integer
    Private OPTION_HEATER As Integer
    Private OPTION_REMOTE As Integer

    Private TARGET_SEAT_BELT_SN As String
    Private TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN As String
    Private TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN As String
    Private TARGET_HANESS_SN As String
    Private TARGET_ECU_SN As String
    Private TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE As String  ' 프레임 바코드 타겟

    Private D_OutString As String
    Private rStep As Double
    Private rCount As Double
    Private StartTime As String
    Private EndTime As String
    Private wStep As Double
    Private wCount As Double

    Public D_Value(0 To 48) As Integer
    Private IN_LABEL(20) As Label
    Private OUT_LABEL(20) As Label
    Private VALUE_IN_LABEL(20) As Label
    Private VALUE_OUT_LABEL(20) As Label
    Public PLC_VALUE(0 To 100) As Integer

    Private Trd1 As Thread
    Private Trd2 As Thread
    Private Trd3 As Thread
    Private RecvString As New System.Text.StringBuilder()

    Private Player As New SoundPlayer

    Private Sub NG()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampNG()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DingDOng()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\DINGDONG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampOK()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click
        Dim old As Long
        If Environment.Is64BitOperatingSystem Then
            If Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection(old) Then
                Process.Start(osk)
                Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(old)
            End If
        Else
            Process.Start(osk)
        End If
    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool1.Open()
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool1.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool1.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool1 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
        End Try


    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal targetname As String, ByVal strdata As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & targetname & " = '" & strdata & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String
        Dim s As String
        Dim Tmp As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        s = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 1, 23)

        If wStep = 9 Then

            ' INR BUCKLE 바코드 판정
            If srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_INR_BUCKLE_DUP And CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

                ' HANESS 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                ElseIf FLAG_HANESS_DUP And CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_HANESS_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

                ' 프레임 바코드 판정
            ElseIf srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                If srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Then
                    ' 이미 판정 완료 - 무시
                Else
                    srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            Else
                NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) >= 10 Then
                Init_Control()
                Load_PArt(Label_Scanner.Text)
                '3.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

            If Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("NNB") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.White
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "NNB"
                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
                wStep = 3.3
            ElseIf Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("WDN") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.White
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.Black
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "WDN"
                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
                wStep = 3.3
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            ' PopV4 태그ID 읽기 명령 (8바이트)
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()

                        '02 02 09 07 E0040 181D1 687B0 3 ' 8 + 16
                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then
                            If Mid(sRecvData, 9, 1) = "E" Then
                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                                ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                                RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
                            Else
                                Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                            End If
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                sRecvData = ""

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))
                            label_Message.Text = ToolData.ToString()

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                ' 이미 판정 완료된 경우 무시
                                If srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "OK" And srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "NA" And srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text <> "PASS" Then
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ToolData

                                    If ToolData >= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private TMPLOT As Integer
    Private TMPYEAR As Integer
    Private TMPMONTHDATE As Integer

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 5001, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text
        TMPLOT = Rs.RecordCount + 5001
        TMPYEAR = CInt(Format(Now, "yyyy"))
        TMPMONTHDATE = CInt(Format(Now, "MMdd"))
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            WORK_PARTNO = Trim(Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then '원본
        If PLC(4300) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then 'D4300
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Else
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then '원본
            If PLC(4300) = 1 And PLC(4301) = 1 Then 'D4300, D4301
                If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                    DeletePallet(RFID_TAG_ID) ' 기존 매핑 삭제
                End If
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then '사양 스캔 대기

            'WORK_PARTNO7' = ""
            'Check_Now()
            'wStep = 3.1

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then '사양 스캔 완료
            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then '칼라 스캔 대기

            'If Len(WORK_PARTNO) = 23 Then
            '    'srcPartNo.Text = WORK_PARTNO
            '    Load_PArt(WORK_PARTNO)
            'End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.3 Then '칼라스캔 완료

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                If OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "4" ' NX5 & HEV
                Else
                    Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3" ' NX4 & HEV
                End If
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "5" ' NX5 & ICE
            End If
            If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then '4359
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "0"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상

            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "0"
            End If

            ' CAR 타입 (NX4=1, NX5=2) - 인덱스 5 (6번째 문자)
            If OPTION_CAR = "NX4" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR = "NX5" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "0"
            End If

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", PLC_STRING)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
            WritePlcValue("D", "4353", CShort(PartID(srcPartNo.Text)))
            WritePlcValue("D", "4354", CShort(TMPYEAR))
            WritePlcValue("D", "4355", CShort(TMPLOT))
            WritePlcValue("D", "4356", CShort(TMPMONTHDATE))
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' 버클 스캔 및 토크 작업

            If (srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 11
            End If
            'ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            '    If (srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
            '        srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            '        srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            '        srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
            '        wStep = 11
            '    End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4351", "1")
            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then '원본
            'If PLC(4351) = 1 Then 'D4351
            '    wStep = 13
            'Else
            '    wStep = 11
            'End If
            wStep = 13

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then '원본
            If PLC(4302) = 1 Then 'D4302
                wStep = 13.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then

            ' DB에 태그ID-시리얼 매핑 저장 (RFID 데이터 있을 때만)
            If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If
            Tmr_Count = 0
            wStep = 13.2

        ElseIf wStep = 13.2 Then

            Tmr_Count = Tmr_Count + 0.1
            If Tmr_Count >= 0.3 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4358", "1")
                wStep = 14
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            Save_DB()
            RFID_TAG_ID = ""
            AddGrid(srcPartNo.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR)
            InitGrid()
            LoadGrid()
            'Save_Count()
            'Init_Grid()
            'Load_Grid()
            wStep = 15

        ElseIf wStep = 15 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(2) = 0 Then '원본
            If PLC(4302) = 0 Then 'D4302
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    ' Table_pallet 자동 생성
    Private Sub EnsureTablePallet()
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Sql_Connect.Execute(
                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Table_pallet') " &
                "CREATE TABLE Table_pallet ( " &
                "ID numeric(18,0) IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY, " &
                "PalletID nvarchar(50), " &
                "SerialNumber nvarchar(50) )")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' DB에서 태그ID 매핑 삭제
    Private Sub DeletePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' DB에 태그ID-시리얼 매핑 저장
    Private Sub SavePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String, ByVal strSerial As String)
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("PalletID").Value = strPalletID
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function PartID(ByVal strPArtno As String) As String

        Connection_Open()
        Dim pID As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & strPArtno & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            pID = Rs.Fields("PLC_ID").Value
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return pID

    End Function

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean
        AppMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "NX4_REAR_LH_ST01", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "LH_ST01", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            Application.Exit()
            Return
        End If

        ' Updater Agent 시작 (미실행 시에만)
        Try
            If Process.GetProcessesByName("Updater_Agent").Length = 0 Then
                Dim agentPath As String = System.IO.Path.Combine(Application.StartupPath, "Updater_Agent.exe")
                If System.IO.File.Exists(agentPath) Then
                    Process.Start(agentPath)
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        ' PLC 통신 컨트롤 생성
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
        Me.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()

        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        EnsureIndexes()
        SerialOpen()
        EnsureTablePallet()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.160"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4300" & vbLf &
                                "D4301" & vbLf &
                                "D4302" & vbLf &
                                "D4303" & vbLf &
                                "D4304" & vbLf &
                                "D4305" & vbLf &
                                "D4306" & vbLf &
                                "D4307" & vbLf &
                                "D4308" & vbLf &
                                "D4309" & vbLf &
                                "D4310" & vbLf &
                                "D4311" & vbLf &
                                "D4350" & vbLf &
                                "D4351" & vbLf &
                                "D4352" & vbLf &
                                "D4353" & vbLf &
                                "D4354" & vbLf &
                                "D4355" & vbLf &
                                "D4356" & vbLf &
                                "D4357" & vbLf &
                                "D4358" & vbLf &
                                "D4359" & vbLf &
                                "D4360" & vbLf &
                                "D4361"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private OptionSAb As String

    Sub WritePlcValue(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal wValue As Short)

        ''WritePlc("D", "5053", "0")
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'


        szDeviceName = strChr & Format((Int(StartArry)), "0000") 'D 4000
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, wValue)
        Catch exception As Exception
            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            srcPartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value

            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Dim tmp As String

            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)
            Next

            srcPartName.Text = tmp

            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

            OptionSAb = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value

            OPTION_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
            OPTION_CAR_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_COUNTRY = Rs.Fields("OPTION_COUNTRY").Value

            OPTION_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_WS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_WS").Value)
            OPTION_CTR_TETHER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CTR_TETHER").Value)
            OPTION_HEATER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value)
            OPTION_REMOTE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_REMOTE").Value)
            OPTION_CLR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CLR").Value)

            TARGET_SEAT_BELT_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("SEAT_BELT_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_HANESS_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_ECU_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

            ' CAR 컬럼 읽기 (NX4 또는 NX5)
            Try
                OPTION_CAR = Trim(Rs.Fields("CAR").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception
                OPTION_CAR = ""
            End Try

            ' TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE 컬럼 읽기
            Try
                TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = Trim(Rs.Fields("TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE").Value)
                If IsDBNull(Rs.Fields("TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE").Value) Then
                    TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = ""
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = ""
            End Try

            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
            If OPTION_WS = 1 Then
                srcWS.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcWS.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CTR_TETHER = 1 Then
                srcCTR_TETHER.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCTR_TETHER.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_HEATER = 1 Then
                srcHEATER.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcHEATER.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then
                srcREMOTE.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcREMOTE.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CLR = 1 Then
                srcCLR.BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                srcCLR.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "ICE" Then
                srcDIVE.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFOLD.BackColor = Color.White
                srcHEV.BackColor = Color.White
                srcICE.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            TARGET_SEAT_BELT_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("SEAT_BELT_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_HANESS_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("HANESS_SERIAL").Value)
            TARGET_ECU_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)


            'If TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN <> "" Then
            '    If FUNCTION_BUCKLE_TQ = True Then

            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ""
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = ""
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.White
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""

            '    Else

            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = "PASS"
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS"
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT

            '    End If

            '    If FUNCTION_BUCKLE_SERIAL = True Then

            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ""
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = ""
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.White
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

            '    Else

            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = "PASS"
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS"
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
            '        srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

            '    End If
            'End If

            If TARGET_INR_BUCKLE_SN <> "" Then
                If FUNCTION_BUCKLE_TQ = True Then

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT

                Else

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = "PASS"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT

                End If

                If FUNCTION_BUCKLE_SERIAL = True Then

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

                Else

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = "PASS"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("INR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

                End If
            End If

            If FUNCTION_HANESS_SERIAL = True Then

                srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text = TARGET_HANESS_SN

                If srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text = "0" Then
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"

                Else
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ""
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.BackColor = Color.White

                srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green

            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
            End If

            If OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("DOMESTIC") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.Black

            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("NORTH AMERICA") Then

                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.Black
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.White
            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("AUSTRAILIA RUSSIA") Then
                srcDOMESTIC.BackColor = Color.White
                srcRUSSIA.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcNORTHAMERICA.BackColor = Color.White
                srcAUSTRAILIA.BackColor = Color.Black
            End If

            ' 프레임 바코드 타겟 설정 (null 또는 "0"이면 NA)
            If TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = "" Or TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE = "0" Then
                srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = "NA"
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text = ""
            Else
                srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = ""
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text = TARGET_FRAME_BARCODE
            End If

            wStep = 3.1

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub LampOK()

        Const C_index As Byte = 0
        Const C_type As Byte = 0

        Const D_not As Short = 100 ' Don't care  // Do not change before state
        Const C_lampoff As Byte = 0
        Const C_lampon As Byte = 1
        Const C_lampblink As Byte = 2

        Dim b_in As Boolean
        Dim b_vb As Boolean

        Dim bData(17) As Byte

        bData(0) = C_lampoff ' Red
        bData(1) = C_lampoff ' Yellow
        bData(2) = C_lampon ' Green
        'bData(3) = C_lampon ' Blue
        'bData(4) = C_lampblink ' White

        ' Sound      0-(off)   1-4(Sound select)
        ' Else ' Don't care   Do not change before state
        bData(5) = 0

        b_in = Usb_Qu_write(0, 0, bData(0))

        If b_in = 0 Then
            b_vb = False
        Else
            b_vb = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LampNG()


        Const C_index As Byte = 0
        Const C_type As Byte = 0

        Const D_not As Short = 100 ' Don't care  // Do not change before state
        Const C_lampoff As Byte = 0
        Const C_lampon As Byte = 1
        Const C_lampblink As Byte = 2

        Dim b_in As Boolean
        Dim b_vb As Boolean

        Dim bData(17) As Byte

        bData(0) = C_lampon ' Red
        bData(1) = C_lampoff ' Yellow
        bData(2) = C_lampoff ' Green
        'bData(3) = C_lampon ' Blue
        'bData(4) = C_lampblink ' White

        ' Sound      0-(off)   1-4(Sound select)
        ' Else ' Don't care   Do not change before state
        bData(5) = 2


        b_in = Usb_Qu_write(0, 0, bData(0))

        If b_in = 0 Then
            b_vb = False
        Else
            b_vb = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2

        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
        Dim dlg As New Form()
        Dim txt As New TextBox()
        Dim okBtn As New Button()
        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
        Dim lbl As New Label()
        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
        lbl.AutoSize = True
        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
        okBtn.Text = "확인"
        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
        Dim input As String = txt.Text

        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()
            frm.ShowDialog()
            LoadFProofFlags()
        Else
            MessageBox.Show("비밀번호가 틀렸습니다.", "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With GridCount

            .SuspendLayout()
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            ' 컬럼 추가
            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "품번")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "생산수량")

            ' 컬럼 설정
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 240
            .Columns(2).Width = 150

            For i As Integer = 0 To 2
                .Columns(i).DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                .Columns(i).DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 24.0!, FontStyle.Bold)
                .Columns(i).SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

            ' 헤더 스타일
            .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
            .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 24.0!, FontStyle.Bold)
            .ColumnHeadersHeight = 45

            .ResumeLayout()

        End With

    End Sub


    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT JObPartNo,JobCount FROM Table_Count ORDER BY LEN(JobPartNo),JobPartNo", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            Rs.MoveFirst()

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF

                    GridCount.Rows.Add("", Rs.Fields("JobPartNo").Value, Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End If

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ResetGrid()

        Dim strSQL As String

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        strSQL = "DELETE * FROM TABLE_COUNT"
        Mdb_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub AddGrid(strPart As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpInt As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Count WHERE JobPartNo = '" & strPart & "'", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

            Rs.AddNew()

            Rs.Fields("JobPartno").Value = strPart
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = "1"
            Rs.Update()

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            TmpInt = CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
            TmpInt = TmpInt + 1
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = CStr(TmpInt)
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    

End Class

content.thinking:
The user wants:
1. The outer `If` should branch by `Contains` only (to determine which item the scan is for)
2. Inside each branch, check NA/PASS guard3. If already judged, just skip (don't enter the branch at all, or skip processing)But the problem remains - if the outer If branches by Contains only, and the first branch matches, the frame barcode will be caught there and the "guard" will just skip it, never reaching the frame branch.

The user says "Contains 조건으로 큰 분기 되고 그 안에서 가드 조건 처리되게 수정". But that's what we had before, and it causes the frame barcode problem.


Maybe the solution is to use independent If blocks for each scan item instead of chaining them with ElseIf, so each barcode type gets its own chance to match regardless of what came before, with a handled flag to prevent duplicate processing. I see the structure now—using a `handled` flag to control the flow through each barcode check lets me keep the Contains condition as the outer branch while the inner guard conditions determine whether to process or skip. It's a clean way to handle the frame barcode issue without restructuring the whole logic, though I'm wondering if there's a simpler approach that avoids introducing the flag altogether. I see the core issue now—using ElseIf creates a fallthrough problem where an already-judged item blocks processing of other items in the same barcode. The solution is to switch to sequential If blocks with a handled flag, so each condition can be checked independently and we can continue processing even after finding a match. I'm restructuring the logic to check INR_BUCKLE, HARNESS, and FRAME as separate conditions rather than mutually exclusive branches. Continuing through the validation logic for the HANESS barcode component, checking if it's already been judged or if there's a duplicate entry to flag, then moving into the same pattern for the FRAME barcode validation. I'm reconsidering the approach here—using sequential If blocks seems cleaner than trying to manage a handled flag or Exit Sub, since those create other complications with the frame processing logic.
